## з’ҒжҚҗо…ёйҚҗеҙҮз“ҘйҺҪжЁҝоӣҰ

| ж¶“е©ҡо•Ҫ | йҚҗеҙҮз“Ҙ |
| --- | --- |
| йҗўг„Өз·Ҙзҗӣг„ЁжҸӘ | RuleTrans йҗўзҶёеһҡйҗЁеӢ¬зҘҙз’Үжӣ ж•Өжёҡе¬ӘеҺӣйҗўзҶёеһҡж¶“ж°¬е§ҹ JSONй”ӣеІҖж•ӨжЈ°е——з…ҷеҰҜвҖізҖ·зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘжқҲж’іеҸҶйҚңеІ„о•©йҸҲзҶ»з·ӯйҚ‘зҢҙзҙқйҚҷоҒғз№ҡйҗЈж¬ҸеҸ§й–ҝоҶјз“§еЁҲ?|
| еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҺөСҶо”‘ | йҸӮжқҝо–ғ source зҒһеӮқз№Қзҗӣеұҫж№ҮйҚ”?`RuleUnitTestExecutorService`й”ӣеІ„вӮ¬ж°із№ғ `ModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule` йҚ–е‘°о—Ҡж¶“иҚӨеҡҺ `ModuleConstraintExecutor` |
| йҚҰзғҳж«ҷз’әоҲңж•ұ | ж¶“ж°¬е§ҹ JSON ж¶“е¶…е•“ `testMode`й”ӣеІғвӮ¬еұҫж§ёйҚҗж¬ҸеҜҳз‘Ғе‘ӯжӮ—еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҸҲе¶…е§ҹйҗЁеӢ¬жҹҹеЁүжӣһжӮ• `serviceMethod` |
| з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜжҫ¶С…иў« | P0 з‘•е—ҷжҙҠз’Ғпј„з•»з’§е¬ӘвӮ¬иӮ©иў«йҠҶдҪёеҗӢзҖ№еңӯиў«йҠҶдҪ·зҙӯйҚҸе ўиў«ж¶“еӨҢиў«й”ӣж¶ҡе®ійҸүзҶәе№Ҷжҫ§еҶЁжӢ°й—ҲзӮөе®ійҸүзҶәе№Ҷжҫ§еҶ§зІӣйҚ’е——зҙ‘ |
| жқҲж’іеҸҶжқҲж’іеҡӯйҚ’гӮ…з•ҫ | з’Ғпј„з•»з’§е¬ӘвӮ¬иӮ©иў«йҚҸе ҹеҜңеҜ®жӣ ж•Ө/з’§е¬ӘвӮ¬з…ҺеҸ§з»ҜиҜІеһҪзҖ№ж°із·ӯйҚҸгғЁз·ӯйҚ‘зҢҙзҙқйҚҗе¶Ҷж§§зҒҸеӢ«еҹҢйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҠҶдҫҖе„ҙжө иәІвӮ¬дҫҖе„ҙжө и·әеһҺз»«иҚӨз“‘жЈ°е——з…ҷзҖөзЎ…и–„ |
| зҖӣжЁ»ж–ҒйҸӮз‘°зҙЎ | ж¶“ж°¬е§ҹ JSON йҗўг„Өз·Ҙ P0 йҗ©еӯҳеёҙж·ҮжҝҶз“Ёж¶“йёҝзҘ«е©§ж„ӯжһғжө и®№зҙқж¶“е¶…зҘөйҚҸ?JUnit зҖӣжҘғоғҒж¶“?|
| йҚҸз…ҺоҶҗз»ӣж «жҡҗ | ж¶“е¶„з№ҡйҗЈж¬җжЈ« `RuleTransTestCase`/`RuleSnippetAssembler` йҗўзҶёеһҡз’әоҲҡз·һй”ӣж¶ҳз¶ӢйҚ“е¶„зІӣйҸ„оҲңоғҮж¶“вӮ¬йҗ—е ңе”¬йҗ®дҫҠзҙқйҚҷоҲҷдә’ж¶“вӮ¬е§қгғҘеҹҢжөЈе¶ҶжөӣйҺ№?|

---

## 1. йҺҪжЁҝоӣҰ

иӨ°ж’іеў  RuleTrans йҗўзҶёеһҡйҗЁеӢ¬зҘҙз’Үжӣ ж•Өжёҡе¬«жҙҝйҚҚеҝӣжҪ°йҚҡжҲқзҙ©йҺҝеәЎз–„йҗңжү®ж®‘ IT еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜй”ӣж°ұжҙҝйҺәгғ§ж•“йҺҙ?`selectedParts`йҠҶд№Јrequests`йҠҶд№ЈexpectedFirstPartQuantities`йҠҶд№ЈinferRecommendModule(...)` з»ӣеӨҠз“§еЁҲеһ«еһЁжө пҪҮзҲңйҠҶеӮқз№–йҸҚйЈҺж®‘еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜй‘іеҖҹзӘҮй”ӣеұјзөҫж¶“ж°¬е§ҹйҗўг„Ұеҹӣй—…еҸҘдә’зәӯоҶҝо…»жқҲж’іеҸҶйҸ„оҲҷзІҲж¶”е ӣвӮ¬дҫҖо•©йҸҲзҶёж§ёжө вӮ¬ж¶”е ӣвӮ¬дҪ·иҙҹжө вӮ¬ж¶”е Јз№–йҸҚй”ӢзҘҙйҠҶ?
йҸҲ?RFC йҺ»ж„ҜоҶ…йҺ¶еЁҫвӮ¬ж»Җз¬ҹйҚ”вҖіеҪІз’Ү?JSON йҗўг„Өз·ҘйҲҘжҝ…з¶”ж¶“зғҳзҘҙз’Үжӣ ж•“йҺҙж„®ж®‘ж¶“о…ўжЈҝжөңС…еўҝйҚңеұјз°ЁзҖ№зӮҙжҪөе©§ж„¶зҙ°жқҲж’іеҸҶж¶“еәЁо•©йҸҲзҶ»з·ӯйҚ‘жҙӘе…ҳйҺёеӨҗо•«йҚ©зҶёДҒйҚЁе¬«ејҝжқ©её®зҙқйӘһеүҒж•ұе§қпҪ…зҙЎжқ©ж„Ҝо”‘жө пҪҮзҲң `RuleUnitTestExecutorService` з’ӢеҶӘж•Ө `ModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule` зҖ№еұҫеһҡйҺөСҶо”‘йҠҶдҪәзІЁйҸӢж»ҶжөҶйҺ№гҲ жӢ°е§Јж—Үз·қй”ӣеұҫжё¶йҚҡеәўеҰёеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜзјҒж’ҙзҒүжқ©ж–ҝжҙ–зјҒж¬‘жҷ«й—ҲгҲЎеһЁйҚҘзӮІз¶ҠеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҚҸгғҘеҪӣйҠҶ?
---

## 2. йҚ”г„ҰжәҖ

### 2.1 иӨ°ж’іеў й—ӮоҮҖо•Ҫ

йҗңзүҲж№ҒйҗўзҶёеһҡй–ҫжҚҗзҹҫжҫ¶СҶеҡ§йҸ„оҲӨзҙ°

```text
й‘·оҒҶеҠ§з’Үо…Ўв–Ҳз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ -> йҗўзҶёеһҡз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜжө пҪҮзҲң -> йҗўзҶёеһҡ RuleTransTestCase -> RuleSnippetAssembler йҗўзҶёеһҡ JUnit
```

иӨ°ж’іеў  `RuleTransTestCase` е®ёиҢ¬зІЎйҚ–е‘ӯжғҲжҫ¶ж°ұоқ’й—ҲгҲ жӮңеҜ®жӣҹжҗёеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҗЁеӢ«з“§еЁҲзўүзҙ°

```java
selectedParts
expectedValid
requests
expectedResult
partCode
quantity
preParas
expectedFirstPartQuantities
expectedFirstParaValues
```

жқ©ж¬Һз°әзҖӣжҘҒоҶҢйҗЁеӢҜжЈ¶жЈ°жЁ№з¬үйҸ„оҲ—вӮ¬ж»Җз¬үй‘іиҠҘзҘҙз’Үжӣ—вӮ¬жҝ“зҙқй‘°еұҫж§ёзҗӣг„ЁжҸӘзҒһеӮңйӘҮйҚӢеҝҺз¶Ҷй”ӣ?
1. ж¶“ж°¬е§ҹйҗўг„ҰеҹӣйҗӘе¬ӘеҹҢйҗЁеӢ¬ж§ёеҜ®жӣҹжҗёз’ӢеҶӘж•ӨйҸӮз‘°зҙЎй”ӣеІғвӮ¬еұјз¬үйҸ„оҲҷз¬ҹйҚ”ВӨз·ӯйҚҸгғҘжӢ°ж¶“ж°¬е§ҹжЈ°еӢ¬ж№ЎйҠҶ?2. йҚҡеұјз«ҙж¶“оҒҶж•Өжёҡе¬®еҷ·жқҲж’іеҸҶж¶“еәӨз·ӯйҚ‘е“„зҲ¶з”Ҝй•җз¬үйҸ„оҲҡжӮ“ж¶“вӮ¬з»үе¶үо•«йҚ©зҶ»гҖғжқҲж’…зҙқжёҡе¬Әоӣ§жқҲж’іеҸҶйҸ„оҲқоҮ¬е§№?DSLй”ӣеІғз·ӯйҚ‘зғҳж§ё `PartInst` йҗӯо…һз“§з»—пёҝиҰҶйҠҶ?3. ж¶“е¶…жӮ“з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜжҫ¶С…иў«йҗЁеӢ«жӮҺй–«еӮӣзҘҙз’ҮжӣҹжҹҹеҜ®еҝҺз¬үйҚҡеІӢзҙқжөЈе——з¶ӢйҚ“е¶Үж•“йҺҙж„°вӮ¬жҳҸз·«зҖ№и§„ж§—йҺёеӨҠзҙ©йҺҝеәЎжәҖйҸ…оҲӣжәҖе§Ҡжқҝоҡңйҗўг„ЈвӮ¬?4. зҖөзЎ…о…ёз» жҘ„зҘҙйҚҠиӮ©иў«з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣеІҖе·ұзҒҸжҲ”вӮ¬ж»ғж‘ўжөңж¶ҷж§ёеҜ®жӣ ж•ӨжқҲж’іеҸҶйҠҶдҪёж‘ўжөңж¶ҷж§ёз’§е¬ӘвӮ¬иү°з·ӯйҚ‘иЎЎвӮ¬жҝҲж®‘зјҒзҶ¶з«ҙйҚ’гӮ…з•ҫйҠҶ?
йҸҲ?RFC йҚҡеәҜзҙқйҸӮжү®ж®‘ж¶“е©ҡж‘јз’әоҲқзҡҹйҸҒзҝ иҙҹй”ӣ?
```text
й‘·оҒҶеҠ§з’Үо…Ўв–Ҳз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
  -> йҗўзҶёеһҡз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜжө пҪҮзҲң
  -> йҗўзҶёеһҡж¶“ж°¬е§ҹ JSON йҗўг„Өз·ҘйҸӮеӣҰж¬ў
  -> RuleUnitTestExecutorService з’ҮиҜІеҪҮйҗўг„Өз·Ҙ
  -> ModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule з’ӢеҶӘж•Өж¶“иҚӨеҡҺеҜ®жӣҹжҗё
  -> ж¶“ж°¬е§ҹзјҒж’ҙзҒүе§Јж—Үз·қ
  -> жқ©ж–ҝжҙ–йҗЈеІ„жҪ°/еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҺ¶гғҘжҶЎ
```

### 2.2 йҗ©оҶҪзҲЈ

P0 йҗ©оҶҪзҲЈй”ӣ?
1. з’Ғв•ғж•“йҺҙж„®ж®‘еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҗўг„Өз·Ҙ JSON й‘іеҖҹоқҰж¶“ж°¬е§ҹйҗўг„Ұеҹӣйҗ©еӯҳеёҙй—ғе‘°оҮ°йҚңеІғзҳҺзҖ№В°вӮ¬?2. жқҲж’іеҸҶйҚңеІ„о•©йҸҲзҶәзІЁйҸӢж»…зІәж¶“вӮ¬жөЈи·Ёж•ӨжЈ°е——з…ҷеҰҜвҖізҖ·зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘй”ӣеұҪз“§еЁҲе…ёз№ҡйҺёдҪ№жё¶зҒҸеҝӢвӮ¬?3. йҺёеӨҺоқүйҚ’ж¬’оҮўж¶”еӨҺеҡңйҚ”г„©вӮ¬еӨӢе«ЁеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҸӮи§„зЎ¶й”ӣеІ„дј©йҚҸе¶Ҷе«ҚйҚҷпҪҮж®‘йҚҷе¶Ҷеё№/е§қпҪҶеё№еЁЈйЈҺж•ӨйҠҶ?4. йҚҰ?source зҒһеӮӣеҪҒжёҡж¶ўжҪ°йҚҡжҲқеҙҹз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҗЁеӢ¬о„ңеҜ®еҝ”еўҪзҗӣеұҫж№ҮйҚ”вҳ…зҙқж¶“е¶„з··з’§?`ModuleScenarioTestBase` йҺҙ?JUnit йҚ©иҷ№иў«йҠҶ?5. йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚҸз…ҺоҶҗз»«жұҮвӮ¬дҪёеҙҹйҚ’е—ҷиў«е§№еӣЁвӮ¬з»ҳзүҺжҘ еұ»вӮ¬дҪ·з¬ҹйҚ”?JSON йҸӮеӣҰж¬ўйҚ–ж §жҪҺйҚҰ?P0 ж¶“вӮ¬е§қгғҘеҹҢж
... (truncated)

## з»—оғҝз«ҙй–®г„ҘеһҺй”ӣж°¶зҚҷйҸҖи·әеҷҜйҚ’ж¬ҷзҙҷз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ/йҚҳзҶ·еһҜй”ӣ?

### 1.1 йҸҚзЁҝзёҫйҚҳзҶ·еһҜ

#### 1.1.1 еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҗўг„Өз·Ҙз’ҒжҚҗо…ёйҚҳзҶ·еһҜ

| йҚҳзҶ·еһҜ | з’Үеӯҳж§‘ | йҚҸиңӮз¶Ӣз‘•дҪ№зң° |
|------|------|----------|
| **й–«жҳҸз·«зҖ№еұҪоҳ¬** | е§ЈеҝҺйҮңйҚ”зҶ»е…ҳйҗЁеӢ¬зҘҙз’Үжӣ еҒЈз‘•дҪёеҸҸй—ҲгҲЈоӣ«йҗ©?| е§қпҪ…зҲ¶з’әоҲҡз·һ + жқҲеңӯжҷ«йҸүвҖІж¬ў + еҜ®еӮҡзҲ¶з’әоҲҡз·һ |
| **йҗўг„Өз·Ҙйҗҷо„ӮзҸӣ** | й–¬еһ®еҺӨйҗўг„Өз·Ҙж¶”е¬®жЈҝй–Іе¶…еҪ” | ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒҶж•Өжёҡе¬ӘеҪ§еЁҙе¬©з«ҙж¶“оҒ„е§ӣй‘із•ҢеҒЈ |
| **йҸҒзүҲеөҒйҸӢдҪәз•қ** | йҚҷоҒғз№ҡйҗЈж¬Ҹз¶ӢйҚ“е¶…е§ӣй‘іи—үеҸ§еЁүг„§ж®‘йҸҒзүҲеөҒ | йҸғзҠІеҸ§йҗЁеӢ«еј¬йҸҒ?й–®г„Өж¬ў/з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜж¶“вӮ¬еҜ°е¬¬жё·йҗЈ?|
| **зҒһеӮӣоӮјеЁ“е‘®ж«ҡ** | жөңСғжҗ§з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜжҫ№зүҲж§‘йҠҶдҪҪз№ҚзҗӣеұҫжӨӮз’ӢеҶӘж•ӨйҠҶдҪ№зҘҙз’ҮжӣҹжҹҮз‘·вӮ¬ж¶“е¶Ҳе…ҳеЁЈй”ӢжҪ… | жөңСғжҗ§жёҡС…ж•ӨеЁүг„ЁР’/Schema/й–°е¶Үз–ҶйҗўзҶёеһҡйҚ©иҷ№о”…йҸҒзүҲеөҒй”ӣеұҫзҘҙз’ҮжӣһеҪ§й–«ж°із№ғйҚҸо„ҖеҸЎйҚҸгғҘеҪӣжөЈи·Ёж•Ө |
| **йҺәгғҘеҪӣзҖ№еұҫжҡЈ** | RFC еЁ‘еӨҠеј·жҫ¶ж°«йҮңйҚҸгғҘеҪӣйҸғи·әз№ҖжӨӨе©ҡвӮ¬ж„Әз«ҙжҘ еІғзҳү | йҗўзҶёеһҡ/йҺәг„§жӮҠз’әоҲҡз·һ + йҸҚпҝ зҚҷз’әоҲҡз·һ + з’Үе©ғжҹҮж·Үв„ғдј… |

#### 1.1.2 еҜ®вӮ¬йҚҷжҲһзҘҰз»Ӣе¬Әеё«йҚ’?
| йҚҳзҶ·еһҜ | з’Үеӯҳж§‘ | йҚҸиңӮз¶Ӣз‘•дҪ№зң° |
|------|------|----------|
| **жҫ¶е¶Үж•ӨйҚҷеӮқвӮ¬?* | йҸӮжқҝо–ғйҗўг„Өз·ҘйҸғи·әоҳІйҚ’и·әеј¬й‘°еҶ©зҘҙз’ҮжӣЎвӮ¬еІ„жҪӘжө еәЎгҒ”йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“ | жҫ¶е¶…еҹ— йҲ«?ж·ҮоҶҪж•ј йҲ«?жҘ еІғзҳү |
| **жҫ¶е¶Үж•ӨзҒҸдҪҪо—Ҡ** | жөјжЁәеҺӣжөЈи·Ёж•ӨеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҚ©иҷ№иў«йҚңеұҪеҮЎйҸҲ?helper | ж¶“е¶…ж№ӘеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҸӮи§„зЎ¶й–ІеІ„еҷёжҫ¶е¶ҮзІҚз‘Ғе‘ӯоҳІйҸү?Req/Resp |
| **жҫ¶С„ДҒйҚЁе¬®зҚҷз’Ү?* | жҫ¶е¶ҶжҪ…й–«жҳҸз·«й—ҮвӮ¬йҗўг„ҘгҒҮеҰҜвҖізҖ·жөңгӮ…еј¶жҘ еІғзҳү | й‘·оҒ„е§©йҗўзҶёеһҡ Prompt йҲ«?LLM жҘ еІғзҳү |
| **й‘·оҒ„е§©йҚ–ж §жҙ–иӨ°?* | жҘ еІғзҳүй–«ж°із№ғйҗЁеӢӯж•Өжёҡе¬®жё¶з»ҫеҶІеҸҶйҚҘзӮІз¶ҠеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜй—Ҷ?| `mvn test` йҚҷоҲқеҡңйҚ”г„ҰеўҪзҗӣ?|

#### 1.1.3 з’ҒжҚҗо…ёз»ҖиҪ°з·Ҙ

**йүӮ?й–ҝж¬’оҮӨз»ҖиҪ°з·Ҙ**й”ӣж°«з«ҙж¶“оҒҶж•Өжёҡе¬«зҘҙжҫ¶ж°«йҮңйҚ”зҶ»е…ҳй”ӣеұҫжҡҹйҺ№оҶје•‘жөЈ?

```java
// й–ҝж¬’оҮӨй”ӣж°«з«ҙж¶“оҒҶж•Өжёҡе¬«зҘҙжөң?ж¶“оҒ„е§ӣй‘іж–ӨзҙқйҸҒзүҲеөҒжҫ¶е¶ҶжҪ…
@PartAnno(code = "cpu")    // ж¶“е¶ҮжөүйҚҸ?
@PartAnno(code = "gpu")    // ж¶“е¶ҮжөүйҚҸ?
@PartAnno(code = "memory")  // ж¶“е¶ҮжөүйҚҸ?
@ParaAnno  // ж¶“е¶ҮжөүйҚҸ?
private PartVar storage;   // ж¶“е¶ҮжөүйҚҸ?

@Test
public void testRequiresAndIncompatibleAndPriority() {
    // йҚҡеұҫжӨӮеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜ3з»үе¶ҲоқүйҚ’?..
}
```

**йүҒ?е§қпҪҮвҖҳз»ҖиҪ°з·Ҙ**й”ӣж°«з«ҙж¶“оҒҶж•Өжёҡе¬ӘеҪ§еЁҙе¬©з«ҙж¶“оҒ„е§ӣй‘іж–ӨзҙқйҸҒзүҲеөҒйҸӢдҪәз•қ

```java
// йүҒ?е§қпҪҮвҖҳй”ӣж°¬еҪ§еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜ Requires з»ҫпёҪжҪ«й”ӣеұҫжҡҹйҺ№оҶҪзҖ¬з» вӮ¬
@ParaAnno(options = {"i9", "i7", "i5"})
private ParaVar cpuVar;

@ParaAnno(options = {"air", "liquid"})
private ParaVar coolerVar;

@Test
public void testRequires_cpu_i9_needs_liquid() {
    // йҚҷоҒ…зҘҙз’Ү?Requires з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
}

@Test
public void testRequires_cpu_i7_no_restriction() {
    // йҚҷоҒ…зҘҙз’Ү?i7 ж¶“е¶…еҪҲй—„ж„¬еҹ—йҗЁеӢ¬е„ҸйҚҗ?
}
```

### 1.2 еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҚ’е—ҷиў«

| еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜз»«иҜІзҖ· | йҺ»еҝҡе Ә | йҚҷеӮқвӮ¬еҶӘгҒҡжёҡ?| зҖӣжЁ»ж–ҒжөЈе¶Үз–Ҷ |
|----------|------|----------|----------|
| **йҚҰзғҳж«ҷеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜ** | жҫ¶е¶ҶжҪ…зјҒж’ҙзҖҜйҺ¬С„зҘҙз’ҮжӣӘзҙқз”Ҝп№Җз•¬йҸҒзҝ з¬ҹйҚ”в„ғжҡҹйҺ№?| `BaseOptiTest` | `opti/base/` |
| **й–«жҳҸз·«еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜ** | з»ҫоҲңиЎҘеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҸҢж„ӘйҮңз»ҫпёҪжҪ«/з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй–«жҳҸз·« | `CalculateRuleIfThenTest` | `scenario/ruletest/` |
| **APIеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜ** | еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜжҗҙжӣһзң° API йҚ”зҶ»е…ҳе§қпҪҮвҖҳйҺ¬?| `FilterExpressionExecutorTest` | `tool/` |

### 1.3 RFC зҖ№зӮөе№ҮжҘ еұҫж•№зҗӣгғҘеҺ–йҚҳзҶ·еһҜ

| йҚҳзҶ·еһҜ | з’Үеӯҳж§‘ | йҚҸиңӮз¶Ӣз‘•дҪ№зң° |
|------|------|----------|
| **жҫ№зүҲж§‘ж¶“еәқеЁҮйҗўг„ҘеһҺз»Ӯ?* | з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜжҗҙж–ҝеҺӣжөЈж»ҖиҙҹжөңСғжҗ§/еҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҚ©иҷ№о”…йҸҒзүҲеөҒзҗҡоӮўпјҗйҸ„еәЎжӢ°йҗўзҶёеһҡй”ӣеұҪе•ҖйҗўйҒҚж”ўйҚһ?жқ©ж„Ҝо”‘йҸғиҲөеёҙйҚҷпҪ„еЁҮйҗў?| ж¶“е¶…еҺ‘з’ҒзЁҝж№ӘеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҗўг„Өз·Ҙй–ІеұҫеҰёз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҠҶдҪ№зүұжёҡе¬«жҡҹйҺ№оҶәвӮ¬дҪҪз№ҚзҗӣеІғзҡҹйҗўг„ӨеӨҚйҸғиҲөе«ҫйҺҙж„Әз«ҙйҚҘгҲЎжҪөжө пҪҶжөӣжөңСғжҗ§жҫ№зүҲж§‘ |
| **й—ҲгҲ жӮңйҗўг„Ұеҹӣзҗӣг„ЁжҸӘ** | еЁүг„ЁР’йҚң?DSL жҗҙж–ҝж•–й–ІеҝҡеҲӣжқ©жҲңз¬ҹйҚ”?UI зҒһжӣ гҒҡз’Үо…Ўв–Ҳ | жөјжЁәеҺӣ `expr1 = "cpu.CoreNum=8"` жқ©ж¬‘иў«зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘй”ӣеІ„дј©йҚҸе¶ҶжҜҡй—ҮжҸ’е”ҙй–®г„ҰеӘ¶зҖӣжҘҒоҶҢйҸҚз…ҺзҙЎ |
| **й–¬еһ®еҺӨй–Іе¶…оҳІй–°е¶Үз–Ҷ** | йҚҷоҲҷзІ зҖӣж„ҜоқүйҚ’ж¬җеһЁж¶“е©Ғз¬…йҸӮеӣЁеё№зҖөиӮ©ж®‘ж·Үв„ғдј…ж¶“е¶…з°Із‘•дҪ№зң°йҗўг„Ұеҹӣй–Іе¶…оҳІйҚҗ?| жёҡе¬Әоӣ§е®ёеҸүж№Ғ `parentRuleCode` йҸғи®№зҙқйҗ–иҲөж•һз‘ҷпҪ„з¬үеҜ®е“„еҹ—йҚҗе¶…еһӘ `subRuleCodes` |
| **йҚҷеІғзҹҫеҜ°еӢҜзҚҷйҸҖ?* | йҚҡеұјз«ҙз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй‘іи—үе§ҸжҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҸғгҲўж•ӨжөңеәЈж•“йҺҙж„¬ејөйҗўг„Өз°¬йҸҚпҝ зҚҷй”ӣеұҪз№ҖжӨӨи®іиўұйҸүВӨзҹҫеҜ°еӢҜе…ҳеЁҙ?| йҗўзҶёеһҡз’әоҲҡз·һжөЈи·Ёж•Ө `inferParas` / `inferRecommendModule` жӨӢеәўзүёйҺәгғҘеҪӣй”ӣеұҫзүҺжҘ еІғзҹҫеҜ°еӢӘеЁҮйҗў?validator/validate helper |
| **з’Үе©ғжҹҮйҚҷоҲӣзҘҙ** | йҸҚпҝ зҚҷжҫ¶иҫ«и§Ұж¶“е¶Ҳе…ҳйҚҷоҒҮз№‘йҚҘзӮІгҒ‘з’җгғҜзҙқжқ©жЁҝоӣҰй‘іи—үз•ҫжөЈе¶…её«йҚҘ?| йҸӮо…Ўв–Ҳ violated rule code йҺҙж «з“‘жө з–Ҝзҳ–йҸӮо…қдҝҠйҺӯ?|

# JMix Config Engine - йҸҚзЁҝзёҫз’ҒжҚҗо…ёйҸӮеӣЁгҖӮ

## 1. е§’еӮқе Ә

JMix Config Engine йҸ„оҲҷз«ҙж¶“оҒ„зҶҖжөңеәЈе®ійҸүзҶёзң°з‘ҷпҪҮж®‘йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҺәг„§жӮҠеҜ®жӣҹжҗёй”ӣеұјз¬“ж¶“иҪ°йӘҮйҚқдҫҖеҺӨзјғоҶјжәҖйҸ…оҲқоҶ•з’ҒВ°вӮ¬еӮҡз• йҚ’в•ғж•Ө Google OR-Tools CP-SAT е§№еӮқР’йҚЈоҹ’зҙқй‘·оҒ„е§©з’Ғпј„з•»е©ҠВӨеҶ»йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨүз¬ҹйҚ”пј„е®ійҸүзҶәж®‘йҸҲеӨӢжҷҘйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹзјҒеӢ«жӮҺйҠҶ?

### 1.1 йҸҚзЁҝзёҫй‘іи—үе§Ҹ

| й‘іи—үе§Ҹ | йҺ»еҝҡе Ә |
|------|------|
| **з»ҫпёҪжҪ«е§№еӮқР’** | йҚ©иҪ°з°¬ CP-SAT йҗЁеӢӯе®ійҸүзҶёеј§з“’жҠҪжЈ¶жЈ°жЁ»зң°з‘ҷ?|
| **йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҺәг„§жӮҠ** | жө еәЎеҮЎйҗӯгғ§е®ійҸүзҶ·ејҪйҺәг„Ҙеј¬йҸҒжқҝвӮ¬?|
| **е®ёоҮҖеҷәйҚ”зҠәжөҮ** | йҚ©иҪ°з°¬йҚҘеү§ж®‘жёҡжҝҠзҰҶжқ©еҖҹйҮңзҖ№зӮөе№Үй–«еӨӢе«ЁйҺ¬СҶоқүйҚ’ж¬Ҹе§һжқһ?|
| **жҫ¶ж°¬з–„жёҡе¬«ж•®йҺё?* | жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠйҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёоҳҝзҖ№зӮ°з·ҘжөңСғжҗ§й–°е¶Үз–Ҷ |
| **йҚҗиҢ¬зҚҠз’Үе©ғжҹҮ** | й‘·оҒ„е§©йҚҗиҢ¬зҚҠеҰ«вӮ¬еЁҙе¬©з¬Ңз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй—…ж—ӮоһҮ |

### 1.2 йҗ©оҶҪзҲЈйҗўг„Ұеҹӣ

йҸҲо„Җзҙ©йҺҝеәЁжҪ°йҚҡжҲҰжё¶з‘•дҪёзҡўз»ҫпёҪжҪ«е§№еӮқР’й‘іи—үе§Ҹй—Ҷе—ҳеһҡйҚ’йўҒз¬ҹйҚ”пј„йғҙзјҒзҶ¶и…‘йҗЁ?*йҚҡеәЈоҒ¬еҜ®вӮ¬йҚҷжҲңжұүйҚӣ?*йҠҶеӮқоқүйҚ’ж¬‘о…ёйҗһе——жӢ°й–°е¶Үз–ҶйҗЈеІ„жҪ°ж¶“е¶…ж№ӘйҸҲо„„гҖҚйҗ©оҶҝеҜ–йҚҘжқ‘е”ҙйҠҶ?

---

## 2. йҸӢиҲөзҖҜе§’еӮқе Ә

### 2.1 йҸҒзҝ з¶ӢйҸӢиҲөзҖҜйҚҘ?

```
йҲ№еұёж”ўйҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№вӮ¬йҲ№?

package com.jmix.ruletrans;

import com.jmix.executor.ModuleConstraintExecutor;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.model.ConstraintConfig;
import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.assembler.AssembledRuleClass;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.assembler.RuleSnippetAssembler;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.context.ModuleRuleContext;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.context.RuleContext;

import com.jmix.ruletrans.metadata.RuleMetadata;

import com.jmix.ruletrans.postprocessor.CompilationResult;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.postprocessor.FailedTestCase;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.postprocessor.TestExecutionResult;

import com.jmix.ruletrans.prompt.PromptBuilder;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.scenario.RuleScenario;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.scenario.RuleScenarioClassifier;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.RuleTestCaseGenerator;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.BusinessRuleTestCaseSet;
import com.jmix.ruleunit.DefaultRuleUnitTestExecutorService;
import com.jmix.ruleunit.RuleUnitTestCaseSetReport;
import com.jmix.ruleunit.RuleUnitTestReport;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.ModuleGenneratorByAnno;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.PartCategory;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.net.URL;
import java.net.URLClassLoader;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * Orchestrates natural-language rule translation.
 */
@Slf4j
public final class RuleTransEngine {

    private final CategoryIdentifier identifier;
    private final RuleSnippetGenerator generator;
    private final RuleSnippetAssembler assembler;
    private final CompilationProcessor compilationProcessor;
    private final RuleTestCaseGenerator testCaseGenerator;
    private final TestExecutionProcessor testExecutionProcessor;
    private final PromptBuilder promptBuilder;
    private final RuleScenarioClassifier scenarioClassifier;

    public RuleTransEngine(
            CategoryIdentifier identifier,
            RuleSnippetGenerator generator,
            RuleSnippetAssembler assembler,
            CompilationProcessor compilationProcessor,
            RuleTestCaseGenerator testCaseGenerator,
            TestExecutionProcessor testExecutionProcessor,
            PromptBuilder promptBuilder) {
        this(identifier, generator, assembler, compilationProcessor, testCaseGenerator,
                testExecutionProcessor, promptBuilder, new RuleScenarioClassifier());
    }

    public RuleTransEngine(
            CategoryIdentifier identifier,
            RuleSnippetGenerator generator,
            RuleSnippetAssembler assembler,
            CompilationProcessor compilationProcessor,
            RuleTestCaseGenerator testCaseGenerator,
            TestExecutionProcessor testExecutionProcessor,
            PromptBuilder promptBuilder,
            RuleScenarioClassifier scenarioClassifier) {
        this.identifier = identifier;
        this.generator = generator;
        this.assembler = assembler;
        this.compilationProcessor = compilationProcessor;
        this.testCaseGenerator = testCaseGenerator;
        this.testExecutionProcessor = testExecutionProcessor;
        this.promptBuilder = promptBuilder;
        this.scenarioClassifier = scenarioClassifier == null ? new RuleScenarioClassifier() : scenarioClassifier;
    }

    /**
     * зҒҸе—ҡеҡңйҗ’жғ°оҮўз‘·вӮ¬з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜзјҲжҳҸзҳ§ж¶“иҪ°е”¬йҗ®дҪ№жҹҹеЁүжӣҡз¶Ӣй”ӣе ҹжЈӨй–Іе¶ҲзҳҜй”ӣеӨҲвӮ¬?     *
     * @param naturalLanguage й‘·оҒҶеҠ§з’Үо…Ўв–ҲйҺ»еҝҡе ӘйҗЁеӢ®оқүйҚ’?     * @param context з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜж¶“е©Ғз¬…йҸӮеӣ·зҙҷйҚ–е‘ӯжғҲеҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҠҶдҪ№ДҒйҚ§жҘғйӘҮйҚ’оӮЎдҝҠйҺӯоҲңз“‘й”ӣ?     * @return йҗўзҶёеһҡйҗЁеӢӘе”¬йҗ®дҪ№жҹҹеЁүжӣҡз¶Ӣ
     */
    public String translate(String naturalLanguage, RuleContext context) {
        validate(naturalLanguage, context);
        RuleContext preparedContext = prepareContext(naturalLanguage, context);
        RuleScenario scenario = scenarioClassifier.classify(naturalLanguage, preparedContext);
        return generator.generateMethodBody(naturalLanguage, preparedContext, scenario);
    }

    public RuleTransResult translateWithRetry(String naturalLanguage, RuleContext context, int maxRetries) {
        validate(naturalLanguage, context);
        RuleContext preparedContext = prepareContext(naturalLanguage, context);
        RuleScenario scenario = scenarioClassifier.classify(naturalLanguage, preparedContext);
        RuleMetadata metadata = RuleMetadata.from(naturalLanguage, preparedContext, scenario);
        int attemptsLimit = Math.max(1, maxRetries + 1);
        String methodBody = null;
        CompilationResult lastResult = null;
        TestExecutionResult lastTestResult =

package com.jmix.ruletrans;

import com.jmix.ruletrans.postprocessor.CompilationResult;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.postprocessor.TestExecutionResult;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.BusinessRuleTestCaseSet;

/**
 * Final RuleTrans pipeline result.
 */
public record RuleTransResult(
        boolean success,
        String methodBody,
        int attempts,
        CompilationResult compilationResult,
        TestExecutionResult testExecutionResult,
        BusinessRuleTestCaseSet businessTestCaseSet) {

    public RuleTransResult(
            boolean success,
            String methodBody,
            int attempts,
            CompilationResult compilationResult,
            TestExecutionResult testExecutionResult) {
        this(success, methodBody, attempts, compilationResult, testExecutionResult, BusinessRuleTestCaseSet.empty());
    }

    public String snippet() {
        return methodBody;
    }
}

package com.jmix.ruletrans.postprocessor;

import com.jmix.ruletrans.RuleTransException;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.assembler.AssembledRuleClass;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.assembler.RuleTransTempFileManager;

import org.junit.platform.engine.discovery.DiscoverySelectors;
import org.junit.platform.launcher.Launcher;
import org.junit.platform.launcher.LauncherDiscoveryRequest;
import org.junit.platform.launcher.core.LauncherDiscoveryRequestBuilder;
import org.junit.platform.launcher.core.LauncherFactory;
import org.junit.platform.launcher.listeners.SummaryGeneratingListener;
import org.junit.platform.launcher.listeners.TestExecutionSummary;

import java.io.File;
import java.net.URL;
import java.net.URLClassLoader;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Locale;

/**
 * Structured JUnit execution processor for generated tests.
 */
public final class TestExecutionProcessor {

    private final RuleTransTempFileManager tempFileManager;

    public TestExecutionProcessor() {
        this(new RuleTransTempFileManager());
    }

    public TestExecutionProcessor(RuleTransTempFileManager tempFileManager) {
        this.tempFileManager = tempFileManager;
    }

    public TestExecutionResult execute(AssembledRuleClass assembledTestClass) {
        if (assembledTestClass == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("assembledTestClass must not be null");
        }
        ClassLoader originalClassLoader = Thread.currentThread().getContextClassLoader();
        try {
            URLClassLoader loader = classLoader();
            Thread.currentThread().setContextClassLoader(loader);
            Class<?> testClass = Class.forName(assembledTestClass.qualifiedClassName(), true, loader);
            return execute(testClass);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            FailedTestCase failed = new FailedTestCase(
                    assembledTestClass.qualifiedClassName(),
                    assembledTestClass.className(),
                    "",
                    "",
                    "",
                    e.getMessage(),
                    false);
            return new TestExecutionResult(false, 0, 0, 1, List.of(failed));
        } finally {
            Thread.currentThread().setContextClassLoader(originalClassLoader);
        }
    }

    public TestExecutionResult execute(Class<?> testClass) {
        if (testClass == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("testClass must not be null");
        }
        try {
            Launcher launcher = LauncherFactory.create();
            LauncherDiscoveryRequest request = LauncherDiscoveryRequestBuilder.request()
                    .selectors(DiscoverySelectors.selectClass(testClass))
                    .build();
            SummaryGeneratingListener listener = new SummaryGeneratingListener();
            launcher.registerTestExecutionListeners(listener);
            launcher.execute(request);
            return toResult(listener.getSummary());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuleTransException("Failed to run JUnit test class: " + testClass.getName(), e);
        }
    }

    private TestExecutionResult toResult(TestExecutionSummary summary) {
        List<FailedTestCase> failedCases = summary.getFailures().stream()
                .map(this::toFailedCase)
                .toList();
        boolean success = summary.getTestsFailedCount() == 0 && summary.getTestsAbortedCount() == 0;
        return new TestExecutionResult(
                success,
                summary.getTestsFoundCount(),
                summary.getTestsSucceededCount(),
                summary.getTestsFailedCount(),
                failedCases);
    }

    private FailedTestCase toFailedCase(TestExecutionSummary.Failure failure) {
        Throwable exception = failure.getException();
        String reason = exception == null ? "" : exception.getMessage();
        return new FailedTestCase(
                failure.getTestIdentifier().getUniqueId(),
                failure.getTestIdentifier().getDisplayName(),
                "",
                expectedFrom(exception),
                actualFrom(exception),
                reason,
                isRuleLogicError(exception));
    }

    private boolean isRuleLogicError(Throwable exception) {
        if (exception == null) {
            return false;
        }
        String className = exception.getClass().getName().toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT);
        String message = exception.getMessage() == null ? "" : exception.getMessage().toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT);
        if (className.contains("assertion") || className.contains("opentest4j")) {
            return true;
        }
        return message.contains("expected") || message.contains("violated") || message.contains("no solution");
    }

    
... (truncated)

package com.jmix.ruletrans.postprocessor;

import com.jmix.ruletrans.assembler.AssembledRuleClass;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.assembler.RuleTransTempFileManager;

import javax.tools.Diagnostic;
import javax.tools.DiagnosticCollector;
import javax.tools.JavaCompiler;
import javax.tools.JavaFileObject;
import javax.tools.StandardJavaFileManager;
import javax.tools.StandardLocation;
import javax.tools.ToolProvider;

import java.io.File;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Locale;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * Structured Java compilation processor for RuleTrans temporary classes.
 */
public final class CompilationProcessor {

    private final RuleTransTempFileManager tempFileManager;

    public CompilationProcessor() {
        this(new RuleTransTempFileManager());
    }

    public CompilationProcessor(RuleTransTempFileManager tempFileManager) {
        this.tempFileManager = tempFileManager;
    }

    public CompilationResult compile(AssembledRuleClass assembledRuleClass) {
        if (assembledRuleClass == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("assembledRuleClass must not be null");
        }
        return compile(assembledRuleClass.sourceFile());
    }

    public CompilationResult compile(Path sourceFile) {
        if (sourceFile == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("sourceFile must not be null");
        }
        JavaCompiler compiler = ToolProvider.getSystemJavaCompiler();
        if (compiler == null) {
            List<String> errors = List.of("JDK compiler is not available. Run with a JDK instead of a JRE.");
            return new CompilationResult(false, -1, errors, errors, sourceFile, tempFileManager.classesRoot());
        }

        DiagnosticCollector<JavaFileObject> diagnostics = new DiagnosticCollector<>();
        try (StandardJavaFileManager fileManager = compiler.getStandardFileManager(
                diagnostics, Locale.ROOT, java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets.UTF_8)) {
            fileManager.setLocation(StandardLocation.CLASS_OUTPUT, List.of(tempFileManager.classesRoot().toFile()));
            Iterable<? extends JavaFileObject> compilationUnits =
                    fileManager.getJavaFileObjectsFromFiles(List.of(sourceFile.toFile()));
            List<String> options = List.of("-encoding", "UTF-8", "-classpath", classpath());
            JavaCompiler.CompilationTask task = compiler.getTask(
                    null, fileManager, diagnostics, options, null, compilationUnits);
            boolean success = Boolean.TRUE.equals(task.call());
            List<String> diagnosticLines = diagnostics.getDiagnostics().stream()
                    .map(this::formatDiagnostic)
                    .toList();
            List<String> errors = diagnostics.getDiagnostics().stream()
                    .filter(diagnostic -> diagnostic.getKind() == Diagnostic.Kind.ERROR)
                    .map(this::formatDiagnostic)
                    .collect(Collectors.toList());
            return new CompilationResult(success, success ? 0 : 1, errors, diagnosticLines,
                    sourceFile, tempFileManager.classesRoot());
        } catch (IOException e) {
            List<String> errors = List.of("Compilation failed before javac execution: " + e.getMessage());
            return new CompilationResult(false, -1, errors, errors, sourceFile, tempFileManager.classesRoot());
        }
    }

    private String classpath() {
        String projectRoot = System.getProperty("user.dir");
        String pathSep = File.pathSeparator;
        List<String> entries = new ArrayList<>();
        entries.add(System.getProperty("java.class.path", ""));
        entries.add(Path.of(projectRoot, "target", "classes").toString());
        entries.add(Path.of(projectRoot, "target", "test-classes").toString());
        entries.add(tempFileManager.classesRoot().toString());
        File libDir = Path.of(projectRoot, "lib").toFile();
        File[] jars = libDir.listFiles((dir, name) -> name.toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT).endsWith(".jar"));
        if (jars != null) {
            for (File jar : jars) {
                entries.add(jar.getAbsolutePath());
            }
        }
        return String.join(pathSep, entries);
    }

    private String formatDiagnostic(Diagnostic<? extends JavaFileObject> diagnostic) {
        String sourceName = diagnostic.getSource() == null ? "<unknown>" : diagnostic.getSource().getName();
        return diagnostic.getKind()
                + " " + sourceName
                + ":" + diagnostic.getLineNumber()
                + ":" + diagnostic.getColumnNumber()
                + " " + diagnostic.getMessage(Locale.ROOT);
    }
}
```
</details></tool-use>

package com.jmix.ruleunit;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.RuleTransException;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.BusinessRuleTestCase;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.BusinessRuleTestCaseSet;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.RuleUnitServiceMethod;

import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * Default service for executing business-readable rule unit cases.
 */
public final class DefaultRuleUnitTestExecutorService implements RuleUnitTestExecutorService {

    private final RuleUnitModuleRegistry moduleRegistry;
    private final ModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule singleRuleExecutor;
    private final RuleUnitInputConverter inputConverter = new RuleUnitInputConverter();
    private final RuleUnitResultComparator comparator = new RuleUnitResultComparator();

    public DefaultRuleUnitTestExecutorService(Module module) {
        this(new StaticRuleUnitModuleRegistry(module), new DefaultModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule());
    }

    public DefaultRuleUnitTestExecutorService(
            RuleUnitModuleRegistry moduleRegistry,
            ModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule singleRuleExecutor) {
        this.moduleRegistry = moduleRegistry;
        this.singleRuleExecutor = singleRuleExecutor == null
                ? new DefaultModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule()
                : singleRuleExecutor;
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitTestReport executeCase(BusinessRuleTestCase testCase) {
        RuleUnitServiceMethod method = RuleUnitServiceMethod.from(testCase.serviceMethod());
        return switch (method) {
            case testAssignment -> testAssignment(testCase);
            case testCompatibility -> testCompatibility(testCase);
            case testPriority -> testPriority(testCase);
            case testPostAssignment -> testPostAssignment(testCase);
        };
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitTestReport executeCaseFile(String caseFilePath) {
        BusinessRuleTestCaseSet caseSet = BusinessRuleTestCaseSet.fromFile(Path.of(caseFilePath));
        RuleUnitTestCaseSetReport report = executeCaseSet(caseSet);
        if (report.caseReports().isEmpty()) {
            return RuleUnitTestReport.failed(caseFilePath, RuleUnitActualResult.failed("No cases found"),
                    List.of("No cases found in file: " + caseFilePath));
        }
        if (report.caseReports().size() == 1) {
            return report.caseReports().get(0);
        }
        List<String> failures = report.caseReports().stream()
                .filter(caseReport -> !caseReport.passed())
                .flatMap(caseReport -> caseReport.failures().stream())
                .toList();
        RuleUnitActualResult actual = report.passed()
                ? report.caseReports().get(0).actual()
                : RuleUnitActualResult.failed(String.join("; ", failures));
        return new RuleUnitTestReport(caseFilePath, report.passed(), actual, failures);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitTestCaseSetReport executeCaseSet(BusinessRuleTestCaseSet caseSet) {
        List<RuleUnitTestReport> reports = new ArrayList<>();
        for (BusinessRuleTestCase testCase : caseSet.cases()) {
            reports.add(executeCase(testCase));
        }
        boolean passed = reports.stream().allMatch(RuleUnitTestReport::passed);
        return new RuleUnitTestCaseSetReport(passed, reports);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitTestReport testAssignment(BusinessRuleTestCase testCase) {
        Module module = module(testCase);
        RuleUnitActualResult actual = singleRuleExecutor.testAssignment(
                module.getId(),
                module,
                inputConverter.toInput(testCase));
        return toReport(testCase, actual);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitTestReport testCompatibility(BusinessRuleTestCase testCase) {
        Module module = module(testCase);
        RuleUnitActualResult actual = singleRuleExecutor.testCompatibility(
                module.getId(),
                module,
                inputConverter.toInput(testCase));
        return toReport(testCase, actual);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitTestReport testPriority(BusinessRuleTestCase testCase) {
        Module module = module(testCase);
        RuleUnitActualResult actual = singleRuleExecutor.testPriority(
                module.getId(),
                module,
                inputConverter.toInput(testCase));
        return toReport(testCase, actual);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitTestReport testPostAssignment(BusinessRuleTestCase testCase) {
        Module module = module(testCase);
        RuleUnitActualResult actual = singleRuleExecutor.testPostAssignment(
                module.getId(),
                module,
                inputConverte

package com.jmix.ruleunit;

import com.jmix.executor.ModuleConstraintExecutor;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.PartCategory;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
import com.jmix.executor.model.ModuleValidateResp;
import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.RuleUnitDiagnostic;

import java.util.List;

/**
 * Default single-rule facade backed by the production ModuleConstraintExecutor.
 */
public final class DefaultModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule implements ModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule {

    private final ModuleConstraintExecutor executor;
    private final RuleUnitInputConverter inputConverter = new RuleUnitInputConverter();
    private final RuleUnitResultConverter resultConverter = new RuleUnitResultConverter();

    public DefaultModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule() {
        this(ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST);
    }

    public DefaultModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule(ModuleConstraintExecutor executor) {
        this.executor = executor == null ? ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST : executor;
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitActualResult testAssignment(Long moduleId, Module module, RuleUnitInput input) {
        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = executor.inferParas(
                inputConverter.toInferReq(moduleId, module, input, true));
        return resultConverter.fromInferenceResult(module, result);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitActualResult testAssignment(Long moduleId, PartCategory partCategory, RuleUnitInput input) {
        return testAssignment(moduleId, (Module) null, input);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitActualResult testCompatibility(Long moduleId, Module module, RuleUnitInput input) {
        return validate(moduleId, module, input);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitActualResult testCompatibility(Long moduleId, PartCategory partCategory, RuleUnitInput input) {
        return validate(moduleId, null, input);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitActualResult testPriority(Long moduleId, Module module, RuleUnitInput input) {
        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = executor.inferParas(
                inputConverter.toInferReq(moduleId, module, input, true));
        return resultConverter.fromInferenceResult(module, result);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitActualResult testPriority(Long moduleId, PartCategory partCategory, RuleUnitInput input) {
        return testPriority(moduleId, (Module) null, input);
    }

    @Override
    public RuleUnitActualResult testPostAssignment(Long moduleId, Module module, RuleUnitInput input) {
        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = executor.postCalculate(
                inputConverter.toPostCalcReq(moduleId, module, input));
        return resultConverter.fromInferenceResult(module, result);
    }

    private RuleUnitActualResult validate(Long moduleId, Module module, RuleUnitInput input) {
        Result<ModuleValidateResp> result = executor.validate(inputConverter.toValidateReq(moduleId, module, input));
        RuleUnitActualResult actual = resultConverter.fromValidationResult(result);
        if (Boolean.TRUE.equals(actual.compatible()) || !actual.diagnostics().isEmpty()) {
            return actual;
        }

        Result<List<ModuleInst>> relaxedResult = executor.inferParas(
                inputConverter.toDiagnosticInferReq(moduleId, module, input));
        List<RuleUnitDiagnostic> diagnostics = resultConverter.diagnosticsFromInferenceResult(relaxedResult).stream()
                .filter(diagnostic -> module != null && module.getRule(diagnostic.ruleCode()).isPresent())
                .toList();
        if (diagnostics.isEmpty()) {
            return actual;
        }
        return new RuleUnitActualResult(
                actual.engineResultCode(),
                actual.message(),
                actual.compatible(),
                actual.parameters(),
                actual.parts(),
                actual.solutions(),
                diagnostics);
    }
}

/**
 * Assembles generated rule method bodies into temporary compile units.
 */
public final class RuleSnippetAssembler {

    private static final String DEFAULT_PACKAGE = "com.jmix.ruletrans.generated";
    private static final int[] DATTR_ANNOTATIONS = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 11, 12, 13};

    private final RuleTransTempFileManager tempFileManager;

    public RuleSnippetAssembler() {
        this(new RuleTransTempFileManager());
    }

    public RuleSnippetAssembler(RuleTransTempFileManager tempFileManager) {
        this.tempFileManager = tempFileManager;
    }

    public AssembledRuleClass assembleCompileUnit(String methodBody, RuleContext context, String className) {
        RuleScenario scenario = defaultScenario(context);
        RuleMetadata metadata = RuleMetadata.from("", context, scenario);
        return assembleCompileUnit(methodBody, context, scenario, metadata, className);
    }

    public AssembledRuleClass assembleCompileUnit(
            String methodBody,
            RuleContext context,
            RuleScenario scenario,
            RuleMetadata metadata,
            String className) {
        validateBodyAndContext(methodBody, context);
        String safeClassName = normalizeClassName(className);
        String source = sourceFor(safeClassName, completeRuleMethod(methodBody, context, scenario, metadata), context);
        return new AssembledRuleClass(
                DEFAULT_PACKAGE,
                safeClassName,
                DEFAULT_PACKAGE + "." + safeClassName,
                source,
                tempFileManager.writeSource(DEFAULT_PACKAGE, safeClassName, source));
    }

    public AssembledRuleClass assembleExecutableTest(
            String methodBody,
            RuleContext context,
            RuleTransTestCaseSet testCaseSet,
            String className) {
        RuleScenario scenario = defaultScenario(context);
        RuleMetadata metadata = RuleMetadata.from("", context, scenario);
        return assembleExecutableTest(methodBody, context, scenario, metadata, testCaseSet, className);
    }

    public AssembledRuleClass assembleExecutableTest(
            String methodBody,
            RuleContext context,
            RuleScenario scenario,
            RuleMetadata metadata,
            RuleTransTestCaseSet testCaseSet,
            String className) {
        validateBodyAndContext(methodBody, context);
        if (testCaseSet == null || testCaseSet.isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("testCaseSet must not be empty");
        }
        String safeClassName = normalizeClassName(className);
        String source = executableTestSource(
                safeClassName,
                completeRuleMethod(methodBody, context, scenario, metadata),
                context,
                testCaseSet);
        return new AssembledRuleClass(
                DEFAULT_PACKAGE,
                safeClassName,
                DEFAULT_PACKAGE + "." + safeClassName,
                source,
                tempFileManager.writeSource(DEFAULT_PACKAGE, safeClassName, source));
    }

    public RuleTransTempFileManager tempFileManager() {
        return tempFileManager;
    }

package com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Part;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.PartCategory;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.RuleTransException;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.context.RuleContext;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.prompt.PromptBuilder;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.scenario.RuleScenario;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.BusinessRuleFamily;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.BusinessRuleTestCase;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.BusinessRuleTestCaseSet;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.RuleUnitServiceMethod;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.TestEnvironment;
import com.jmix.tool.impl.llm.LLMInvoker;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Comparator;
import java.util.HashSet;
import java.util.LinkedHashSet;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Locale;
import java.util.Set;

/**
 * Generates and parses structured P1 test cases using the existing LLM invoker.
 */
public final class RuleTestCaseGenerator {

    private final LLMInvoker llmInvoker;
    private final PromptBuilder promptBuilder;

    public RuleTestCaseGenerator(LLMInvoker llmInvoker, PromptBuilder promptBuilder) {
        this.llmInvoker = llmInvoker;
        this.promptBuilder = promptBuilder;
    }

    public RuleTransTestCaseSet generate(String naturalLanguage, RuleContext context, String methodBody) {
        return generate(naturalLanguage, context, null, methodBody);
    }

    public RuleTransTestCaseSet generate(
            String naturalLanguage,
            RuleContext context,
            RuleScenario scenario,
            String methodBody) {
        if (llmInvoker == null) {
            return RuleTransTestCaseSet.empty();
        }
        String prompt = promptBuilder.buildTestCasePrompt(naturalLanguage, context, scenario, methodBody);
        try {
            String response = llmInvoker.generate(PromptBuilder.SYSTEM_MESSAGE, prompt);
            return pruneGeneratedCases(naturalLanguage, context, RuleTransTestCaseSet.fromJson(response));
        } catch (RuleTransException e) {
            throw e;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuleTransException("LLM test case generation failed: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        }
    }

    public BusinessRuleTestCaseSet generateBusinessCases(
            String naturalLanguage,
            RuleContext context,
            RuleScenario scenario,
            String methodBody) {
        if (llmInvoker == null) {
            return BusinessRuleTestCaseSet.empty();
        }
        String prompt = promptBuilder.buildTestCasePrompt(naturalLanguage, context, scenario, methodBody);
        try {
            String response = llmInvoker.generate(PromptBuilder.SYSTEM_MESSAGE, prompt);
            return normalizeBusinessCases(scenario, BusinessRuleTestCaseSet.fromJson(response));
        } catch (RuleTransException e) {
            throw e;
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuleTransException("LLM business test case generation failed: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        }
    }

    private BusinessRuleTestCaseSet normalizeBusinessCases(
            RuleScenario scenario,
            BusinessRuleTestCaseSet caseSet) {
        if (caseSet.isEmpty()) {
            return caseSet;
        }
        List<BusinessRuleTestCase> cases = caseSet.cases().stream()
                .map(testCase -> normalizeBusinessCase(scenario, testCase))
                .toList();
        return new BusinessRuleTestCaseSet(caseSet.ruleMethod(), cases);
    }

    private BusinessRuleTestCase normalizeBusinessCase(
            RuleScenario scenario,
            BusinessRuleTestCase testCase) {
        BusinessRuleFamily family = testCase.businessFamily() == null
                ? businessFamily(scenario)
                : testCase.businessFamily();
        TestEnvironment environment = testCase.environment() == null
                ? defaultEnvironment(scenario)
                : testCase.environment();
        String serviceMethod = notBlank(testCase.serviceMethod())
                ? RuleUnitServiceMethod.from(testCase.serviceMethod()).name()
                : serviceMethod(family, environment);
        return new BusinessRuleTestCase(
                testCase.id(),
                testCase.title(),
                family,
                testCase.scenario(),
                environment,
                serviceMethod,
                testCase.given(),
                testCase.expect(),
                testCase.note());
    }

    private RuleTransTestCaseSet pruneGeneratedCases(
            String naturalLanguage,
            RuleContext context,
            RuleTransTestCaseSet testCaseSet) {
        if (testCaseSet.isEmpty()) {
            return testCaseSet;
        }
        boolean allowRecommendCases = allowsRecommendCases(naturalLanguage,
... (truncated)
```

/**
 * RFC-0011 RuleTrans engine tests.
 */
public class RuleTransModuleTest {

    @Test
    public void testPartCategoryRuleGenerationReturnsPureMethodBody() {
        RuleTransEngine engine = engine(realLlmInvoker());

        String methodBody = engine.translate("cpu йҸҲвӮ¬жҫ¶ж°¬еҪ§й‘ід»ӢвӮ¬еӨӢе«Ёж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒҲе„ҙжө ?, RuleContextFactory.partCategory(sampleModule(), "cpu"));

        assertTrue(methodBody.contains("model().addLessOrEqual"), methodBody);
        assertTrue(methodBody.contains("sum4Selected"), methodBody);
        assertFalse(methodBody.contains("@CodeRuleAnno"), methodBody);
        assertFalse(methodBody.contains("public void"), methodBody);
        assertFalse(methodBody.contains("package "), methodBody);
        assertFalse(methodBody.contains("class "), methodBody);
    }

    @Test
    public void testModuleTranslateUsesIdentifiedCategories() {
        ModuleRuleContext context = RuleContextFactory.module(sampleModule());

        String methodBody = engine(realLlmInvoker())
                .translate("cpu ж¶“о…һзқҳйҺ¬?CoreNum ж¶“?4 йҗЁеӢҜе„ҙжө жңөз¬үй‘іи—үжӢ° drive ж¶“о…һзқҳйҺ¬?Speed ж¶“?5400 йҗЁеӢҜе„ҙжө и·әжӮ“йҸғе •вӮ¬еӨӢе«Ё", context);

        assertTrue(methodBody.contains("cpu"), methodBody);
        assertTrue(methodBody.contains("drive"), methodBody);
        assertFalse(methodBody.contains("@CodeRuleAnno"), methodBody);
        assertFalse(methodBody.contains("public void"), methodBody);
        assertFalse(methodBody.contains("package "), methodBody);
        assertFalse(methodBody.contains("class "), methodBody);
    }

    @Test
    public void testPartCategoryTranslateWithRetryCompilesMethodBody() {
        RuleTransResult result = engine(realLlmInvoker()).translateWithRetry(
                "cpu йҸҲвӮ¬жҫ¶ж°¬еҪ§й‘ід»ӢвӮ¬еӨӢе«Ёж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒҲе„ҙжө ?,
                RuleContextFactory.partCategory(sampleModule(), "cpu"),
                1);

        assertTrue(result.success(), String.valueOf(result.testExecutionResult()));
        assertTrue(result.compilationResult().success(), String.join("\n", result.compilationResult().errors()));
        assertTrue(result.methodBody().contains("model().addLessOrEqual"), result.methodBody());
        assertFalse(result.methodBody().contains("@CodeRuleAnno"), result.methodBody());
    }

    @Test

        RuleTransResult result = engineWithGeneratedCases(realLlmInvoker()).translateWithRetry(
                "cpu йҸҲвӮ¬жҫ¶ж°¬еҪ§й‘ід»ӢвӮ¬еӨӢе«Ёж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒҲе„ҙжө ?,

    }

        assertNotNull(result.testExecutionResult());
        assertTrue(result.testExecutionResult().testsSucceeded() > 0);
    }

package com.jmix.ruleunit;

import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.BusinessRuleTestCase;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.BusinessRuleTestCaseSet;

/**
 * Executes business-readable rule unit JSON cases.
 */
public interface RuleUnitTestExecutorService {

    RuleUnitTestReport executeCase(BusinessRuleTestCase testCase);

    RuleUnitTestReport executeCaseFile(String caseFilePath);

    RuleUnitTestCaseSetReport executeCaseSet(BusinessRuleTestCaseSet caseSet);

    RuleUnitTestReport testCompatibility(BusinessRuleTestCase testCase);

}

package com.jmix.ruleunit;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.PartCategory;

/**
 * Single-rule unit facade over the main ModuleConstraintExecutor.
 */
public interface ModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule {

    RuleUnitActualResult testAssignment(
            Long moduleId,
            Module module,
            RuleUnitInput input);

    RuleUnitActualResult testAssignment(
            Long moduleId,
            PartCategory partCategory,
            RuleUnitInput input);

    RuleUnitActualResult testCompatibility(
            Long moduleId,
            Module module,
            RuleUnitInput input);

    RuleUnitActualResult testCompatibility(
            Long moduleId,
            PartCategory partCategory,
            RuleUnitInput input);

    RuleUnitActualResult testPriority(
            Long moduleId,

            Long moduleId,

}

package com.jmix.ruleunit;

import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.BusinessCaseExpect;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.RuleUnitDiagnostic;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.RuleUnitParameter;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.RuleUnitPart;
import com.jmix.ruletrans.testgen.business.RuleUnitSolution;

import java.util.List;

/**
 * Business-facing actual result from one single-rule unit execution.
 */
public record RuleUnitActualResult(
        int engineResultCode,
        String message,
        Boolean compatible,
        List<RuleUnitParameter> parameters,
        List<RuleUnitPart> parts,
        List<RuleUnitSolution> solutions,
        List<RuleUnitDiagnostic> diagnostics) {

    public RuleUnitActualResult {
        parameters = parameters == null ? List.of() : List.copyOf(parameters);
        parts = parts == null ? List.of() : List.copyOf(parts);
        solutions = solutions == null ? List.of() : List.copyOf(solutions);
        diagnostics = diagnostics == null ? List.of() : List.copyOf(diagnostics);
    }

    public static RuleUnitActualResult failed(String message) {
        return new RuleUnitActualResult(Result.FAILED, message, false, List.of(), List.of(), List.of(), List.of());
    }

    public BusinessCaseExpect toExpectShape() {
        return new BusinessCaseExpect(compatible, parameters, parts, solutions, diagnostics);
    }
}
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Add: `doc/RFC-0014-RuleTrans-End-to-End-RuleUnit-Pipeline.md`**

```diff
+# RFC-0014: RuleTrans еҲ° RuleUnit зҡ„з«ҜеҲ°з«Ҝдё»жөҒзЁӢйҮҚжһ„
+
+> зҠ¶жҖҒпјҡиҚүжЎҲпјҲDraftпјү
+> ж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2026-06-13
+> зӣёе…іж–ҮжЎЈпјҡ`doc/RFC-0011-RuleTrans-Module.md`, `doc/RFC-0013-Business-Readable-Rule-Test-Cases.md`, `doc/CORE-DESIGN.md`, `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md`
+
+---
+
+## 1. ж‘ҳиҰҒ
+
+RFC-0013 е·Із»ҸжҠҠвҖңдёҡеҠЎеҸҜиҜ» JSON з”ЁдҫӢ + RuleUnit жү§иЎҢжңҚеҠЎвҖқзҡ„ж ёеҝғиғҪеҠӣжҗӯиө·жқҘгҖӮеҪ“еүҚеү©дҪҷй—®йўҳжҳҜдё»жөҒзЁӢиҝҳжІЎжңүеҪ»еә•ж”¶жқҹпјҡ`RuleTransEngine` иҷҪз„¶е·Із»ҸиғҪи°ғз”Ё `RuleUnitTestExecutorService`пјҢдҪҶжһ„йҖ еҷЁгҖҒеӯ—ж®өгҖҒж—§жөӢиҜ•з”ҹжҲҗеҷЁе’Ң `RuleSnippetAssembler` дёӯд»Қдҝқз•ҷдәҶзӣҙжҺҘз”ҹжҲҗе№¶иҝҗиЎҢ JUnit зҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ
+
+жң¬ RFC и®ҫи®ЎдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„з«ҜеҲ°з«Ҝдё»жөҒзЁӢпјҡ
+
+```text
+з”ЁжҲ·иҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖи§„еҲҷ
+  -> RuleTrans еҺҹжңүзҝ»иҜ‘й“ҫи·Ҝз”ҹжҲҗ Java и§„еҲҷж–№жі•дҪ“
+  -> з»„иЈ…дёҙж—¶ Java и§„еҲҷзұ»е№¶зј–иҜ‘
+  -> з”ұжіЁи§Јз”ҹжҲҗ Module
+  -> з”ҹжҲҗдёҡеҠЎ JSON еҚ•е…ғжөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢ
+  -> RuleUnitTestExecutorService жү§иЎҢдёҡеҠЎз”ЁдҫӢ
+  -> иҝ”еӣһзҝ»иҜ‘гҖҒзј–иҜ‘гҖҒеҚ•е…ғжөӢиҜ•з»ҹдёҖжҠҘе‘Ҡ
+```
+
+йҮҚжһ„еҗҺпјҢRuleTrans дё»жөҒзЁӢдёҚеҶҚз”ҹжҲҗ JUnit жөӢиҜ•зұ»пјҢд№ҹдёҚеҶҚйҖҡиҝҮ JUnit Launcher жү§иЎҢж ЎйӘҢгҖӮJUnit еҸӘдҪңдёәйЎ№зӣ®иҮӘиә«еӣһеҪ’жөӢиҜ•жЎҶжһ¶еӯҳеңЁпјҢдёҚдҪңдёә RuleTrans иҝҗиЎҢж—¶дё»й“ҫи·Ҝзҡ„дёҖйғЁеҲҶгҖӮ
+
+---
+
+## 2. еҪ“еүҚй—®йўҳ
+
+### 2.1 дё»жөҒзЁӢеӯҳеңЁж··еҗҲзҠ¶жҖҒ
+
+еҪ“еүҚд»Јз Ғдёӯе·Із»ҸеҮәзҺ°ж–°ж—§дёӨжқЎй“ҫи·Ҝе№¶еӯҳпјҡ
+
+- ж–°й“ҫи·Ҝпјҡ`RuleTransEngine.translateWithRetry(...)` зј–иҜ‘з”ҹжҲҗзҡ„и§„еҲҷзұ»еҗҺпјҢйҖҡиҝҮ `DefaultRuleUnitTestExecutorService` жү§иЎҢдёҡеҠЎ JSON з”ЁдҫӢгҖӮ
+- ж—§й“ҫи·Ҝпјҡ`RuleTransEngine` д»ҚжіЁе…Ҙ `TestExecutionProcessor`пјӣ`RuleSnippetAssembler` д»ҚжҸҗдҫӣ `assembleExecutableTest(...)`пјӣ`TestExecutionProcessor` д»ҚзӣҙжҺҘдҫқиө– JUnit LauncherгҖӮ
+
+иҝҷдјҡеёҰжқҘдёүдёӘй—®йўҳпјҡ
+
+1. дё»жөҒзЁӢдҫқиө–е…ізі»дёҚжё…жҷ°пјҡзңӢжһ„йҖ еҷЁеҫҲйҡҫеҲӨж–ӯзңҹжӯЈзҡ„жү§иЎҢе…ҘеҸЈжҳҜ RuleUnit иҝҳжҳҜ JUnitгҖӮ
+2. ж—§жЁЎеһӢжҢҒз»ӯжі„жјҸпјҡ`RuleTransTestCase`гҖҒ`selectedParts`гҖҒ`requests`гҖҒ`expectedFirstPartQuantities` зӯүе®һзҺ°еһӢеӯ—ж®өд»Қиў« source еұӮдҝқз•ҷгҖӮ
+3. еҗҺз»ӯдҝ®еӨҚе®№жҳ“иө°й”ҷи·Ҝеҫ„пјҡејҖеҸ‘иҖ…еҸҜиғҪз»§з»ӯиЎҘ `RuleSnippetAssembler` зҡ„ JUnit з”ҹжҲҗйҖ»иҫ‘пјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜиЎҘжӯЈејҸзҡ„ RuleUnit жү§иЎҢиғҪеҠӣгҖӮ
+
+### 2.2 зӣҙжҺҘи°ғз”Ё JUnit дёҚйҖӮеҗҲеҒҡдёҡеҠЎдё»й“ҫи·Ҝ
+
+JUnit йҖӮеҗҲеҒҡйЎ№зӣ®еӣһеҪ’жөӢиҜ•пјҢдёҚйҖӮеҗҲжүҝжӢ… RuleTrans иҝҗиЎҢжңҹйӘҢиҜҒпјҡ
+
+- JUnit жөӢиҜ•зұ»жҳҜд»Јз ҒиҪҪдҪ“пјҢдёҚжҳҜдёҡеҠЎз”ЁдҫӢдәӢе®һжқҘжәҗгҖӮ
+- JUnit жү§иЎҢжҠҘе‘Ҡйқўеҗ‘жөӢиҜ•жЎҶжһ¶пјҢдёҚйқўеҗ‘дёҡеҠЎз•ҢйқўжҲ–жңҚеҠЎжҺҘеҸЈгҖӮ
+- JUnit ж–ӯиЁҖеӨұиҙҘеҸӘиғҪиҜҙжҳҺжҹҗдёӘз”ҹжҲҗжөӢиҜ•еӨұиҙҘпјҢдёҚеӨ©з„¶иЎЁиҫҫи§„еҲҷз”ЁдҫӢйҮҢзҡ„ `given`гҖҒ`expect`гҖҒ`diagnostics`гҖӮ
+- з”ҹжҲҗ JUnit йңҖиҰҒжҠҠжөӢиҜ• helperгҖҒж–ӯиЁҖе’Ңеј•ж“Һи°ғз”Ёз»ҶиҠӮеЎһеӣһ Java жәҗз ҒпјҢиҝқиғҢ RFC-0013 зҡ„дёҡеҠЎеҸҜиҜ» JSON ж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ
+
+---
+
+## 3. зӣ®ж ҮдёҺйқһзӣ®ж Ү
+
+### 3.1 зӣ®ж Ү
+
+P0 зӣ®ж Үпјҡ
+
+1. жҸҗдҫӣдёҖдёӘд»ҺиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖи§„еҲҷеҲ° RuleUnit жөӢиҜ•жҠҘе‘Ҡзҡ„з»ҹдёҖдё»е…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
+2. дҝқз•ҷе№¶еӨҚз”ЁеҺҹ RuleTrans зҝ»иҜ‘иғҪеҠӣпјҡеҲҶзұ»иҜҶеҲ«гҖҒеңәжҷҜеҲҶзұ»гҖҒprompt з”ҹжҲҗгҖҒLLM з”ҹжҲҗи§„еҲҷж–№жі•дҪ“гҖҒж–№жі•дҪ“еҗҺеӨ„зҗҶгҖҒJava зј–иҜ‘гҖӮ
+3. дё»жөҒзЁӢдҪҝз”Ё RFC-0013 зҡ„ `BusinessRuleTestCaseSet` е’Ң `RuleUnitTestExecutorService` жү§иЎҢйӘҢиҜҒгҖӮ
+4. д»Һ `src/main/java` зҡ„ RuleTrans дё»й“ҫи·ҜдёӯеҲ йҷӨзӣҙжҺҘи°ғз”Ё JUnit зҡ„д»Јз ҒгҖӮ
+5. жҳҺзЎ®зј–иҜ‘еӨұиҙҘгҖҒз”ЁдҫӢз”ҹжҲҗеӨұиҙҘгҖҒRuleUnit жү§иЎҢеӨұиҙҘгҖҒи§„еҲҷйҖ»иҫ‘еӨұиҙҘзҡ„йҮҚиҜ•зӯ–з•ҘгҖӮ
+6. и®©жңҖз»Ҳз»“жһңеҗҢж—¶еҢ…еҗ«пјҡз”ҹжҲҗзҡ„ Java ж–№жі•дҪ“гҖҒзј–иҜ‘з»“жһңгҖҒдёҡеҠЎ JSON з”ЁдҫӢгҖҒRuleUnit жү§иЎҢжҠҘе‘ҠгҖҒеӨұиҙҘеҲҶзұ»гҖӮ
+
+### 3.2 йқһзӣ®ж Ү
+
+P0 дёҚеҒҡпјҡ
+
+1. дёҚйҮҚеҶҷ `RuleSnippetGenerator` зҡ„ LLM з”ҹжҲҗзӯ–з•ҘгҖӮ
+2. дёҚж”№еҸҳ `ModuleConstraintExecutor` зҡ„з”ҹдә§жұӮи§ЈиҜӯд№үгҖӮ
+3. дёҚжҠҠдёҡеҠЎ JSON еҚҮзә§дёәжӯЈејҸеҢ—еҗ‘дёҡеҠЎ APIпјҢд»…дҪңдёә RuleTrans еҚ•и§„еҲҷйӘҢиҜҒдәӢе®һжқҘжәҗгҖӮ
+4. дёҚиҰҒжұӮжҜҸж¬ЎжҲҗеҠҹзҝ»иҜ‘йғҪиҮӘеҠЁеҶҷе…Ҙжәҗз Ғзӣ®еҪ•пјӣжҳҜеҗҰжҢҒд№…еҢ–з”ұй…ҚзҪ®еҶіе®ҡгҖӮ
+5. дёҚиҰҒжұӮдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§еҲ йҷӨжүҖжңүеҺҶеҸІжөӢиҜ•зұ»йҮҢзҡ„ JUnit дҪҝз”ЁпјӣеҸӘеҲ йҷӨдё»жөҒзЁӢзӣҙжҺҘиҝҗиЎҢ JUnit зҡ„е®һзҺ°гҖӮ
+
+---
+
+## 4. ж–°дё»жөҒзЁӢ
+
+### 4.1 жҖ»дҪ“жөҒзЁӢ
+
+```text
+RuleTransPipeline.execute(request)
+  1. validateRequest
+  2. prepareContext
+     - module level ж—¶еӨҚз”Ё CategoryIdentifier иҜҶеҲ«зӣ®ж ҮеҲҶзұ»
+  3. classifyScenario
+     - еӨҚз”Ё RuleScenarioClassifier
+  4. generateMethodBody
+     - еӨҚз”Ё RuleSnippetGenerator
+  5. assembleCompileUnit
+     - еӨҚз”Ё RuleSnippetAssembler еҸӘз»„иЈ…и§„еҲҷзұ»пјҢдёҚз»„иЈ… JUnit
+  6. compile
+     - еӨҚз”Ё CompilationProcessor
+  7. buildModule
+     - з”Ё ModuleGenneratorByAnno д»Һз”ҹжҲҗзұ»жһ„е»ә Module
+  8. generateBusinessCases
+     - еӨҚз”Ё RuleTestCaseGenerator.generateBusinessCases(...)
+  9. executeRuleUnitCases
+     - и°ғз”Ё RuleUnitTestExecutorService.executeCaseSet(...)
+  10. classifyResultAndRetry
+      - ж №жҚ®еӨұиҙҘзұ»еһӢеҶіе®ҡдҝ®еӨҚи§„еҲҷд»Јз ҒгҖҒйҮҚз”ҹжҲҗз”ЁдҫӢжҲ–зӣҙжҺҘиҝ”еӣһеӨұиҙҘ
+```
+
+### 4.2 ж•°жҚ®жөҒ
+
+```text
+RuleTransRequest
+  naturalLanguage
+  RuleContext
+  maxRetries
+  options
+
+    |
+    v
+
+RuleScenario + RuleMetadata
+    |
+    v
+methodBody
+    |
+    v
+AssembledRuleClass
+    |
+    v
+CompilationResult
+    |
+    v
+Generated Module
+    |
+    v
+BusinessRuleTestCaseSet
+    |
+    v
+RuleUnitTestCaseSetReport
+    |
+    v
+RuleTransPipelineResult
+```
+
+### 4.3 жҲҗеҠҹжқЎд»¶
+
+дёҖж¬Ўз«ҜеҲ°з«Ҝжү§иЎҢжҲҗеҠҹеҝ…йЎ»еҗҢж—¶ж»Ўи¶іпјҡ
+
+1. з”ҹжҲҗзҡ„ Java ж–№жі•дҪ“дёҚдёәз©әгҖӮ
+2. з»„иЈ…еҗҺзҡ„ Java и§„еҲҷзұ»зј–иҜ‘йҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ
+3. дёҡеҠЎ JSON з”ЁдҫӢз”ҹжҲҗжҲҗеҠҹпјӣиӢҘз”ЁдҫӢдёәз©әпјҢеҝ…йЎ»жҢүй…ҚзҪ®е…Ғи®ёвҖңеҸӘзј–иҜ‘дёҚжү§иЎҢвҖқгҖӮ
+4. RuleUnit жү§иЎҢжҠҘе‘Ҡ `passed=true`гҖӮ
+5. жІЎжңүеҹәзЎҖи®ҫж–Ҫй”ҷиҜҜпјҢдҫӢеҰӮ Module еҠ иҪҪеӨұиҙҘгҖҒserviceMethod дёҚж”ҜжҢҒгҖҒJSON schema дёҚеҗҲжі•гҖӮ
+
+---
+
+## 5. ж–°еўһдёҺи°ғж•ҙзҡ„ж ёеҝғзұ»еһӢ
+
+### 5.1 RuleTransRequest
+
+ж–°еўһиҜ·жұӮеҜ№иұЎпјҢдҪңдёәиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖдё»е…ҘеҸЈзҡ„е”ҜдёҖе…ҘеҸӮгҖӮ
+
+```java
+public record RuleTransRequest(
+        String naturalLanguage,
+        RuleContext context,
+        int maxRetries,
+        RuleTransPipelineOptions options) {
+}
+```
+
+`RuleTransPipelineOptions`пјҡ
+
+```java
+public record RuleTransPipelineOptions(
+        boolean generateBusinessCases,
+        boolean executeBusinessCases,
+        boolean persistBusinessCases,
+        Path businessCaseOutputRoot,
+        boolean allowEmptyBusinessCases) {
+}
+```
+
+й»ҳи®ӨеҖјпјҡ
+
+| еӯ—ж®ө | й»ҳи®ӨеҖј | иҜҙжҳҺ |
+| --- | --- | --- |
+| `generateBusinessCases` | `true` | з”ҹжҲҗдёҡеҠЎ JSON з”ЁдҫӢ |
+| `executeBusinessCases` | `true` | зј–иҜ‘йҖҡиҝҮеҗҺжү§иЎҢ RuleUnit |
+| `persistBusinessCases` | `false` | й»ҳи®ӨдёҚеҶҷжәҗз Ғзӣ®еҪ•пјҢйҒҝе…Қдё»жөҒзЁӢдә§з”ҹжңӘе®Ўйҳ…ж–Үд»¶ |
+| `businessCaseOutputRoot` | `src/test/resources/rule-unit-cases` | жҳҫејҸжҢҒд№…еҢ–ж—¶зҡ„ж №зӣ®еҪ• |
+| `allowEmptyBusinessCases` | `false` | з«ҜеҲ°з«ҜйӘҢиҜҒй»ҳи®ӨиҰҒжұӮиҮіе°‘дёҖдёӘз”ЁдҫӢ |
+
+### 5.2 RuleTransPipelineResult
+
+жӣҝд»ЈеҪ“еүҚеҒҸж··еҗҲзҡ„ `RuleTransResult`пјҢжҲ–иҖ…дҪңдёә `RuleTransResult` зҡ„дёӢдёҖзүҲеӯ—ж®өз»“жһ„гҖӮ
+
+```java
+public record RuleTransPipelineResult(
+        boolean success,
+        String methodBody,
+        int attempts,
+        RuleScenario scenario,
+        RuleMetadata metadata,
+        CompilationResult compilationResult,
+        BusinessRuleTestCaseSet businessCaseSet,
+        RuleUnitTestCaseSetReport ruleUnitReport,
+        RuleTransFailureKind failureKind,
+        List<String> messages) {
+}
+```
+
+еӨұиҙҘеҲҶзұ»пјҡ
+
+```java
+public enum RuleTransFailureKind {
+    NONE,
+    INVALID_REQUEST,
+    CATEGORY_IDENTIFICATION_FAILED,
+    CODE_GENERATION_FAILED,
+    COMPILATION_FAILED,
+    BUSINESS_CASE_GENERATION_FAILED,
+    BUSINESS_CASE_SCHEMA_INVALID,
+    RULE_UNIT_INFRA_FAILED,
+    RULE_LOGIC_FAILED,
+    RETRY_EXHAUSTED
+}
+```
+
+### 5.3 RuleTransPipeline
+
+е»әи®®ж–°еўһдё“й—Ёзј–жҺ’зұ»пјҢжҠҠ `RuleTransEngine` д»ҺвҖңжүҖжңүдәӢжғ…йғҪеҒҡвҖқзҡ„и§’иүІйҮҢжӢҶеҮәжқҘгҖӮ
+
+```java
+public final class RuleTransPipeline {
+
+    public RuleTransPipelineResult execute(RuleTransRequest request);
+}
+```
+
+иҒҢиҙЈпјҡ
+
+1. зј–жҺ’д»ҺиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖеҲ° RuleUnit жҠҘе‘Ҡзҡ„е®Ңж•ҙжөҒзЁӢгҖӮ
+2. з®ЎзҗҶйҮҚиҜ•зҠ¶жҖҒгҖӮ
+3. еҒҡеӨұиҙҘеҲҶзұ»гҖӮ
+4. з®ЎзҗҶз”ҹжҲҗзұ»еҠ иҪҪеҷЁе’Ң `ModuleConstraintExecutor` з”ҹе‘Ҫе‘ЁжңҹгҖӮ
+5. ж №жҚ®й…ҚзҪ®жҢҒд№…еҢ–дёҡеҠЎ JSONгҖӮ
+
+`RuleTransEngine` еҸҜд»Ҙдҝқз•ҷдёәе…је®№ facadeпјҡ
+
+```java
+public RuleTransPipelineResult translateAndVerify(
+        String naturalLanguage,
+        RuleContext context,
+        int maxRetries) {
+    return pipeline.execute(new RuleTransRequest(...));
+}
+```
+
+ж—§зҡ„ `translate(...)` з»§з»ӯеҸӘиҝ”еӣһж–№жі•дҪ“пјӣ`translateWithRetry(...)` еҸҜд»ҘиҝҒз§»дёәи°ғз”Ёж–° pipelineгҖӮ
+
+### 5.4 RuleUnitCaseExecutionProcessor
+
+ж–°еўһдёҖдёӘйқһ JUnit зҡ„жү§иЎҢйҖӮй…ҚеҷЁпјҢжӣҝжҚў `TestExecutionProcessor` еңЁдё»жөҒзЁӢдёӯзҡ„и§’иүІгҖӮ
+
+```java
+public final class RuleUnitCaseExecutionProcessor {
+
+    public RuleUnitExecutionResult execute(
+            Class<?> generatedRuleClass,
+            BusinessRuleTestCaseSet caseSet);
+}
+```
+
+еҶ…йғЁжөҒзЁӢпјҡ
+
+```text
+Class<?> generatedRuleClass
+  -> ModuleGenneratorByAnno.buildModule(generatedRuleClass)
+  -> ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.init(config)
+  -> ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.addModule(module.getId(), module)
+  -> new DefaultRuleUnitTestExecutorService(module)
+  -> executeCaseSet(caseSet)
+  -> RuleUnitExecutionResult
+  -> ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.fini()
+```
+
+`RuleUnitExecutionResult` еҸҜд»ҘзӣҙжҺҘеҢ…иЈ… `RuleUnitTestCaseSetReport`пјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҸҗдҫӣдёҖеұӮ RuleTrans еҸӢеҘҪзҡ„еӨұиҙҘдҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ
+
+---
+
+## 6. ж—§ JUnit дё»й“ҫи·ҜеҲ йҷӨжё…еҚ•
+
+### 6.1 еҝ…йЎ»д»Һдё»жөҒзЁӢеҲ йҷӨ
+
+| дҪҚзҪ® | и°ғж•ҙ |
+| --- | --- |
+| `RuleTransEngine` | еҲ йҷӨ `TestExecutionProcessor` еӯ—ж®өгҖҒжһ„йҖ еҷЁеҸӮж•°гҖҒ`testExecutionProcessor()` жҡҙйңІж–№жі• |
+| `RuleTransEngine.translateWithRetry(...)` | ж”№дёәи°ғз”Ё `RuleTransPipeline` жҲ–еҶ…йғЁеҸӘиө° RuleUnit жү§иЎҢеҷЁ |
+| `RuleSnippetAssembler` | еҲ йҷӨ `assembleExecutableTest(...)`гҖҒ`executableTestSource(...)`гҖҒ`appendTestMethod(...)` зӯү JUnit жөӢиҜ•зұ»з”ҹжҲҗйҖ»иҫ‘ |
+| `RuleSnippetAssembler` | еҲ йҷӨеҜ№ `RuleTransTestCase`гҖҒ`RuleTransTestCaseSet`гҖҒJUnitгҖҒ`ModuleScenarioTestBase` зҡ„ source еұӮдҫқиө– |
+| `TestExecutionProcessor` | д»Һ `src/main/java` еҲ йҷӨпјҢжҲ–з§»еҠЁеҲ° `src/test/java` дҪңдёәеҺҶеҸІжөӢиҜ•е·Ҙе…· |
+| `FailedTestCase` / `TestExecutionResult` | иӢҘиҜӯд№үд»ҚйңҖеӨҚз”ЁпјҢйҮҚе‘ҪеҗҚдёәйқһ JUnit зҡ„ `RuleTransVerificationFailure` / `RuleTransVerificationResult` |
+| `RuleTestCaseGenerator.generate(...)` | еҲ йҷӨжҲ–ж Үи®°ејғз”Ёж—§ `RuleTransTestCaseSet` и·Ҝеҫ„пјӣдё»жөҒзЁӢеҸӘи°ғз”Ё `generateBusinessCases(...)` |
+
+### 6.2 еҸҜд»ҘжҡӮж—¶дҝқз•ҷдҪҶдёҚеҫ—иў«дё»жөҒзЁӢеј•з”Ё
+
+| зұ»еһӢ | еӨ„зҗҶе»әи®® |
+| --- | --- |
+| еҺҶеҸІ scenario жөӢиҜ•дёӯзҡ„ `RuleScenarioHarnessSupport` | P0 еҸҜе…Ҳж”№дёә test-scope е·Ҙе…·пјҢеҗҺз»ӯйҖҗжӯҘж”№жҲҗдёҡеҠЎ JSON + RuleUnit |
+| `RuleTransTestCase` / `RuleTransTestCaseSet` | иӢҘжөӢиҜ•иҝҳжңӘиҝҒз§»пјҢеҸҜз§»еҲ° `src/test/java` жҲ– `src/testFixtures`пјӣsource дё»жөҒзЁӢдёҚеҫ—дҫқиө– |
+| JUnit жң¬иә« | з»§з»ӯдҪңдёә Maven еӣһеҪ’жөӢиҜ•жЎҶжһ¶еӯҳеңЁ |
+
+### 6.3 еҲ йҷӨеҗҺзҡ„йқҷжҖҒзәҰжқҹ
+
+P0 е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺпјҢд»ҘдёӢе‘Ҫд»ӨдёҚеә”еңЁ `src/main/java/com/jmix/ruletrans` дёӢе‘Ҫдёӯ JUnit иҝҗиЎҢдҫқиө–пјҡ
+
+```powershell
+rg "org\\.junit\\.platform|LauncherFactory|DiscoverySelectors|SummaryGeneratingListener" src/main/java/com/jmix/ruletrans
+```
+
+е…Ғи®ё `src/test/java` дёӯз»§з»ӯдҪҝз”Ё `org.junit.jupiter.api.Test` зј–еҶҷйЎ№зӣ®еӣһеҪ’жөӢиҜ•гҖӮ
+
+---
+
+## 7. йҮҚиҜ•зӯ–з•Ҙ
+
+### 7.1 е°қиҜ•зҠ¶жҖҒ
+
+жҜҸж¬Ўе°қиҜ•и®°еҪ•пјҡ
+
+```java
+public record RuleTransAttemptState(
+        int attempt,
+        String methodBody,
+        CompilationResult compilationResult,
+        BusinessRuleTestCaseSet businessCaseSet,
+        RuleUnitTestCaseSetReport ruleUnitReport,
+        RuleTransFailureKind failureKind) {
+}
+```
+
+### 7.2 йҮҚиҜ•еҶізӯ–зҹ©йҳө
+
+| еӨұиҙҘзұ»еһӢ | жҳҜеҗҰйҮҚиҜ• | дҝ®еӨҚеҜ№иұЎ | Prompt иҫ“е…Ҙ |
+| --- | --- | --- | --- |
+| зј–иҜ‘еӨұиҙҘ | жҳҜ | Java и§„еҲҷж–№жі•дҪ“ | зј–иҜ‘ diagnosticsгҖҒдёҠдёҖзүҲ methodBodyгҖҒи§„еҲҷдёҠдёӢж–Ү |
+| дёҡеҠЎ JSON и§ЈжһҗеӨұиҙҘ | жҳҜ | жөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢ JSON | JSON и§Јжһҗй”ҷиҜҜгҖҒschemaгҖҒиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖгҖҒmethodBody |
+| serviceMethod дёҚж”ҜжҢҒ | жҳҜ | жөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢ JSON | ж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„ж–№жі•жһҡдёҫгҖҒй”ҷиҜҜеӯ—ж®өгҖҒиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖгҖҒmethodBody |
+| RuleUnit жү§иЎҢеҹәзЎҖи®ҫж–ҪеӨұиҙҘ | еҗҰ | ж—  | иҝ”еӣһеӨұиҙҘпјҢдәәе·ҘеӨ„зҗҶ |
+| RuleUnit ж–ӯиЁҖеӨұиҙҘдё”еғҸи§„еҲҷйҖ»иҫ‘й”ҷиҜҜ | жҳҜ | Java и§„еҲҷж–№жі•дҪ“ | failed casesгҖҒactualгҖҒexpectгҖҒmethodBody |
+| RuleUnit ж–ӯиЁҖеӨұиҙҘдё”еғҸз”ЁдҫӢжңҹжңӣй”ҷиҜҜ | жҳҜ | жөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢ JSON | failed casesгҖҒactualгҖҒexpectгҖҒиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖ |
+| йҮҚиҜ•иҖ—е°Ҫ | еҗҰ | ж—  | иҝ”еӣһ `RETRY_EXHAUSTED` |
+
+### 7.3 и§„еҲҷйҖ»иҫ‘еӨұиҙҘдёҺз”ЁдҫӢй”ҷиҜҜзҡ„еҢәеҲҶ
+
+P0 дҪҝз”Ёдҝқе®ҲеҗҜеҸ‘ејҸпјҡ
+
+1. еҰӮжһң Java зј–иҜ‘жҲҗеҠҹпјҢRuleUnit жү§иЎҢжҲҗеҠҹдҪҶжңҹжңӣдёҚеҢ№й…ҚпјҢй»ҳи®Өе…Ҳи®ӨдёәжҳҜи§„еҲҷйҖ»иҫ‘й”ҷиҜҜпјҢдҝ®еӨҚ methodBodyгҖӮ
+2. еҰӮжһңеӨұиҙҘеҺҹеӣ жҳҜ JSON еӯ—ж®өзјәеӨұгҖҒserviceMethod ж— жі•и§ЈжһҗгҖҒpart/parameter code дёҚеӯҳеңЁпјҢи®ӨдёәжҳҜз”ЁдҫӢз”ҹжҲҗй”ҷиҜҜпјҢйҮҚз”ҹжҲҗдёҡеҠЎ JSONгҖӮ
+3. еҰӮжһң `ModuleConstraintExecutor` еҲқе§ӢеҢ–гҖҒзұ»еҠ иҪҪгҖҒжіЁи§Јз”ҹжҲҗ Module еӨұиҙҘпјҢи®ӨдёәжҳҜеҹәзЎҖи®ҫж–Ҫй”ҷиҜҜпјҢдёҚиҮӘеҠЁйҮҚиҜ•гҖӮ
+
+P1 еҸҜд»ҘеҠ е…Ҙжӣҙз»Ҷзҡ„ LLM еҲӨеҲ« promptпјҢи®©жЁЎеһӢеҲӨж–ӯвҖңд»Јз Ғй”ҷиҝҳжҳҜжөӢиҜ•й”ҷвҖқгҖӮ
+
+---
+
+## 8. дёҡеҠЎ JSON з”ҹжҲҗдёҺжҢҒд№…еҢ–
+
+### 8.1 з”ҹжҲҗж—¶жңә
+
+е»әи®®еңЁ Java зј–иҜ‘жҲҗеҠҹд№ӢеҗҺз”ҹжҲҗдёҡеҠЎ JSONпјҡ
+
+```text
+methodBody generated
+  -> compile success
+  -> generate business cases using naturalLanguage + scenario + methodBody
+```
+
+зҗҶз”ұпјҡ
+
+1. зј–иҜ‘еӨұиҙҘж—¶ж— йңҖжөӘиҙ№дёҖж¬ЎжөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢ LLM и°ғз”ЁгҖӮ
+2. зј–иҜ‘йҖҡиҝҮеҗҺзҡ„ methodBody жӣҙзЁіе®ҡпјҢжөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢз”ҹжҲҗ prompt жӣҙеҮҶзЎ®гҖӮ
+3. еҰӮжһңеҗҺз»ӯйҮҚиҜ•еҸӘдҝ®еӨҚ Java д»Јз ҒпјҢеҸҜд»ҘжҢүзӯ–з•ҘйҖүжӢ©еӨҚз”Ёж—§з”ЁдҫӢжҲ–йҮҚж–°з”ҹжҲҗгҖӮ
+
+й»ҳи®Өзӯ–з•Ҙпјҡ
+
+- з¬¬дёҖж¬Ўзј–иҜ‘жҲҗеҠҹеҗҺз”ҹжҲҗдёҡеҠЎ JSONгҖӮ
+- еҰӮжһңеҗҺз»ӯеҸӘжҳҜзј–иҜ‘дҝ®еӨҚпјҢзј–иҜ‘йҖҡиҝҮеҗҺйҮҚж–°з”ҹжҲҗдёҡеҠЎ JSONгҖӮ
+- еҰӮжһңеҗҺз»ӯжҳҜи§„еҲҷйҖ»иҫ‘дҝ®еӨҚпјҢеҸҜеӨҚз”ЁеҗҢдёҖеҘ—дёҡеҠЎ JSONпјҢйҷӨйқһжү§иЎҢжҠҘе‘ҠиЎЁжҳҺз”ЁдҫӢеј•з”ЁдәҶдёҚеӯҳеңЁзҡ„еҜ№иұЎгҖӮ
+
+### 8.2 жҢҒд№…еҢ–зӯ–з•Ҙ
+
+й»ҳи®ӨдёҚиҮӘеҠЁеҶҷе…Ҙжәҗз Ғзӣ®еҪ•гҖӮжҲҗеҠҹеҗҺиӢҘ `persistBusinessCases=true`пјҢеҶҷе…Ҙпјҡ
+
+```text
+src/test/resources/rule-unit-cases/<module-code>/<rule-code>.json
+```
+
+еҶҷе…ҘзәҰжқҹпјҡ
+
+1. еҸӘеҶҷйҖҡиҝҮ RuleUnit жү§иЎҢзҡ„з”ЁдҫӢгҖӮ
+2. ж–Үд»¶еҗҚжқҘиҮӘ `RuleMetadata.ruleCode()`пјҢдёҚеҸҜз”Ёж—¶дҪҝз”Ёж–№жі•еҗҚгҖӮ
+3. иӢҘж–Үд»¶е·ІеӯҳеңЁпјҢй»ҳи®ӨиҰҶзӣ–зӯ–з•Ҙеҝ…йЎ»з”ұ options жҢҮе®ҡпјӣP0 жҺЁиҚҗ `overwrite=false` е№¶иҝ”еӣһеҶІзӘҒж¶ҲжҒҜгҖӮ
+
+---
+
+## 9. дёҺзҺ°жңүзұ»зҡ„е…ізі»
+
+### 9.1 дҝқз•ҷеӨҚз”Ё
+
+| зұ» | ж–°иҒҢиҙЈ |
+| --- | --- |
+| `CategoryIdentifier` | module-level иҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖи§„еҲҷзҡ„зӣ®ж ҮеҲҶзұ»иҜҶеҲ« |
+| `RuleScenarioClassifier` | еҲӨж–ӯи§„еҲҷеӨ§зұ»гҖҒscopeгҖҒPOST/priority зӯү |
+| `RuleSnippetGenerator` | з”ҹжҲҗ Java ж–№жі•дҪ“ |
+| `RuleSnippetAssembler` | еҸӘиҙҹиҙЈз”ҹжҲҗеҸҜзј–иҜ‘и§„еҲҷзұ»пјҢдёҚиҙҹиҙЈз”ҹжҲҗ JUnit жөӢиҜ•зұ» |
+| `CompilationProcessor` | зј–иҜ‘дёҙж—¶и§„еҲҷзұ» |
+| `RuleTestCaseGenerator.generateBusinessCases(...)` | з”ҹжҲҗдёҡеҠЎ JSON з”ЁдҫӢ |
+| `BusinessRuleTestCaseSet` | дёҡеҠЎз”ЁдҫӢдәӢе®һжқҘжәҗ |
+| `DefaultRuleUnitTestExecutorService` | дёҡеҠЎз”ЁдҫӢжү§иЎҢдёҺжҜ”иҫғ |
+| `DefaultModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule` | еҜ№дё»зәҝ `ModuleConstraintExecutor` зҡ„еҚ•и§„еҲҷ facade |
+
+### 9.2 йҮҚе‘ҪеҗҚжҲ–жӢҶеҲҶе»әи®®
+
+| еҪ“еүҚзұ» | е»әи®® |
+| --- | --- |
+| `RuleTransResult` | дҝқз•ҷе…је®№жһ„йҖ еҷЁпјҢдҪҶж–°еўһжҲ–иҝҒз§»еҲ° `RuleTransPipelineResult` |
+| `TestExecutionResult` | иӢҘиҝҳиў« RuleUnit дё»жөҒзЁӢдҪҝз”ЁпјҢж”№еҗҚдёә `RuleTransVerificationResult`пјҢеҲ йҷӨ JUnit иҜӯд№ү |
+| `FailedTestCase` | ж”№еҗҚдёә `RuleTransVerificationFailure` |
+| `TestExecutionProcessor` | еҲ йҷӨжҲ–з§»еҠЁеҲ° test-scopeпјҢдёҚеҶҚиў« source дё»жөҒзЁӢдҫқиө– |
+
+---
+
+## 10. з«ҜеҲ°з«ҜжҺҘеҸЈзӨәдҫӢ
+
+### 10.1 и°ғз”Ёж–№
+
+```java
+RuleTransPipelineResult result = ruleTransPipeline.execute(
+        new RuleTransRequest(
+                "cpu дёӯ CoreNum=4 зҡ„йғЁд»¶дёҚиғҪе’Ң drive дёӯ Speed=5400 зҡ„йғЁд»¶еҗҢж—¶йҖүжӢ©",
+                RuleContextFactory.module(module),
+                1,
+                RuleTransPipelineOptions.defaults()));
+
+if (!result.success()) {
+    log.warn("RuleTrans failed: {}", result.messages());
+}
+```
+
+### 10.2 иҝ”еӣһз»“жһ„
+
+```json
+{
+  "success": true,
+  "attempts": 1,
+  "methodBody": "inCompatible(ruleCode, \"cpu:CoreNum=4\", \"drive:Speed=5400\");",
+  "compilationResult": {
+    "success": true
+  },
+  "businessCaseSet": {
+    "cases": [
+      {
+        "id": "COMP-PART-001",
+        "serviceMethod": "testCompatibility",
+        "given": {
+          "parts": [
+            {"code": "cpu4", "isSelected": true},
+            {"code": "drive5400", "isSelected": true}
+          ]
+        },
+        "expect": {
+          "compatible": false
+        }
+      }
+    ]
+  },
+  "ruleUnitReport": {
+    "passed": true
+  }
+}
+```
+
+---
+
+## 11. е®һзҺ°и®ЎеҲ’
+
+| йҳ¶ж®ө | д»»еҠЎ | дјҳе…Ҳзә§ |
+| --- | --- | --- |
+| P0-1 | ж–°еўһ `RuleTransRequest`гҖҒ`RuleTransPipelineOptions`гҖҒ`RuleTransPipelineResult`гҖҒ`RuleTransFailureKind` | P0 |
+| P0-2 | ж–°еўһ `RuleTransPipeline` зј–жҺ’зұ» | P0 |
+| P0-3 | ж–°еўһ `RuleUnitCaseExecutionProcessor`пјҢе°ҒиЈ…з”ҹжҲҗзұ»еҠ иҪҪгҖҒModule жһ„е»әгҖҒRuleUnit жү§иЎҢе’Ңиө„жәҗжё…зҗҶ | P0 |
+| P0-4 | и°ғж•ҙ `RuleTransEngine.translateWithRetry(...)` и°ғз”Ёж–° pipelineпјҢз§»йҷӨ `TestExecutionProcessor` жһ„йҖ еҷЁдҫқиө– | P0 |
+| P0-5 | иЈҒеүӘ `RuleSnippetAssembler`пјҢеҸӘдҝқз•ҷ compile unit з»„иЈ…пјӣеҲ йҷӨ JUnit жөӢиҜ•зұ»з”ҹжҲҗж–№жі• | P0 |
+| P0-6 | дё»жөҒзЁӢеҒңжӯўдҪҝз”Ё `RuleTransTestCase` / `RuleTransTestCaseSet`пјҢеҸӘдҪҝз”Ё `BusinessRuleTestCaseSet` | P0 |
+| P0-7 | еҲ йҷӨжҲ– test-scope з§»еҠЁ `TestExecutionProcessor` | P0 |
+| P0-8 | жӣҙж–° RuleTrans еӣһеҪ’жөӢиҜ•пјҢдҪҝз”Ё fake LLM + RuleUnit жҠҘе‘Ҡж–ӯиЁҖпјҢдёҚеҶҚж–ӯиЁҖ JUnit Launcher и·Ҝеҫ„ | P0 |
+| P0-9 | еўһеҠ йқҷжҖҒзәҰжқҹжөӢиҜ•пјҢзЎ®дҝқ `src/main/java/com/jmix/ruletrans` дёҚдҫқиө– JUnit Launcher | P0 |
+| P1-1 | еўһеҠ дёҡеҠЎ JSON жҢҒд№…еҢ–йҖүйЎ№е’Ңж–Үд»¶еҶІзӘҒзӯ–з•Ҙ | P1 |
+| P1-2 | еўһејәвҖңд»Јз Ғй”ҷ / з”ЁдҫӢй”ҷвҖқиҮӘеҠЁеҲӨеҲ« prompt | P1 |
+
+---
+
+## 12. йӘҢж”¶ж ҮеҮҶ
+
+### AC-001: иҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖеҲ° RuleUnit жҠҘе‘Ҡз«ҜеҲ°з«ҜйҖҡиҝҮ
+
+з»ҷе®ҡдёҖжқЎиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖе…је®№и§„еҲҷпјҡ
+
+```text
+cpu дёӯ CoreNum=4 зҡ„йғЁд»¶дёҚиғҪе’Ң drive дёӯ Speed=5400 зҡ„йғЁд»¶еҗҢж—¶йҖүжӢ©
+```
+
+еҪ“и°ғз”Ёж–°дё»е…ҘеҸЈеҗҺпјҡ
+
+1. иҝ”еӣһйқһз©ә `methodBody`гҖӮ
+2. `compilationResult.success=true`гҖӮ
+3. иҝ”еӣһйқһз©ә `businessCaseSet.cases`гҖӮ
+4. `ruleUnitReport.passed=true`гҖӮ
+
+### AC-002: дё»жөҒзЁӢдёҚеҶҚзӣҙжҺҘиҝҗиЎҢ JUnit
+
+жү§иЎҢпјҡ
+
+```powershell
+rg "LauncherFactory|DiscoverySelectors|SummaryGeneratingListener|org\\.junit\\.platform" src/main/java/com/jmix/ruletrans
+```
+
+з»“жһңеә”дёәз©әгҖӮ
+
+### AC-003: `RuleSnippetAssembler` дёҚеҶҚз”ҹжҲҗ JUnit жөӢиҜ•зұ»
+
+`RuleSnippetAssembler` дёӯдёҚеҶҚеӯҳеңЁпјҡ
+
+- `assembleExecutableTest`
+- `executableTestSource`
+- `appendTestMethod`
+- `ModuleScenarioTestBase`
+- `org.junit.jupiter.api.Test`
+
+### AC-004: зј–иҜ‘еӨұиҙҘи§ҰеҸ‘д»Јз Ғдҝ®еӨҚйҮҚиҜ•
+
+дҪҝз”Ё fake LLM з¬¬дёҖж¬Ўиҝ”еӣһж— жі•зј–иҜ‘зҡ„ж–№жі•дҪ“гҖҒз¬¬дәҢж¬Ўиҝ”еӣһеҸҜзј–иҜ‘ж–№жі•дҪ“пјҡ
+
+1. pipeline е°қиҜ•ж¬Ўж•°дёә 2гҖӮ
+2. з¬¬дәҢж¬Ўзј–иҜ‘йҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ
+3. иӢҘдёҡеҠЎз”ЁдҫӢжү§иЎҢйҖҡиҝҮпјҢеҲҷж•ҙдҪ“жҲҗеҠҹгҖӮ
+
+### AC-005: дёҡеҠЎ JSON schema й”ҷиҜҜи§ҰеҸ‘з”ЁдҫӢйҮҚз”ҹжҲҗ
+
+дҪҝз”Ё fake LLM з¬¬дёҖж¬Ўиҝ”еӣһдёҚж”ҜжҢҒзҡ„ `serviceMethod`пјҢз¬¬дәҢж¬Ўиҝ”еӣһеҗҲжі• JSONпјҡ
+
+1. з¬¬дёҖж¬ЎеӨұиҙҘеҲҶзұ»дёә `BUSINESS_CASE_SCHEMA_INVALID`гҖӮ
+2. pipeline дёҚдҝ®ж”№ Java methodBodyгҖӮ
+3. з¬¬дәҢж¬Ўз”ЁдҫӢеҗҲжі•е№¶з»§з»ӯ RuleUnit жү§иЎҢгҖӮ
+
+### AC-006: RuleUnit йҖ»иҫ‘еӨұиҙҘи§ҰеҸ‘д»Јз Ғдҝ®еӨҚйҮҚиҜ•
+
+з»ҷе®ҡдёҡеҠЎ JSON жңҹжңӣ `compatible=false`пјҢз¬¬дёҖж¬Ўз”ҹжҲҗи§„еҲҷжңӘж·»еҠ дә’ж–ҘзәҰжқҹпјҡ
+
+1. RuleUnit жҠҘе‘ҠеӨұиҙҘгҖӮ
+2. еӨұиҙҘеҲҶзұ»дёә `RULE_LOGIC_FAILED`гҖӮ
+3. дёӢдёҖж¬Ў prompt еҢ…еҗ«еӨұиҙҘ case зҡ„ `given`гҖҒ`expect`гҖҒ`actual`гҖӮ
+
+### AC-007: JUnit еҸӘдҪңдёәйЎ№зӣ®еӣһеҪ’жөӢиҜ•жЎҶжһ¶еӯҳеңЁ
+
+йЎ№зӣ®жөӢиҜ•д»ҚеҸҜдҪҝз”Ё JUnitпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡ
+
+```powershell
+mvn test "-Dtest=RuleTransPipelineTest,RuleUnitBusinessCaseTest"
+```
+
+дҪҶиў«жөӢзҡ„ RuleTrans дё»жөҒзЁӢдёҚеҫ—еҲӣе»ә JUnit LauncherпјҢдёҚеҫ—з”ҹжҲҗ JUnit жөӢиҜ•жәҗж–Үд»¶гҖӮ
+
+---
+
+## 13. жөӢиҜ•и®ЎеҲ’
+
+ж–°еўһжҲ–и°ғж•ҙжөӢиҜ•пјҡ
+
+| жөӢиҜ•зұ» | иҰҶзӣ–зӮ№ |
+| --- | --- |
+| `RuleTransPipelineTest` | fake LLM з«ҜеҲ°з«ҜжҲҗеҠҹгҖҒзј–иҜ‘йҮҚиҜ•гҖҒRuleUnit еӨұиҙҘйҮҚиҜ• |
+| `RuleTransNoJUnitMainFlowTest` | йқҷжҖҒжү«жҸҸ source дё»жөҒзЁӢдёҚдҫқиө– JUnit Launcher |
+| `RuleSnippetAssemblerCompileUnitTest` | еҸӘз”ҹжҲҗи§„еҲҷзұ»пјҢдёҚз”ҹжҲҗжөӢиҜ•зұ» |
+| `RuleBusinessTestCaseGeneratorTest` | дёҡеҠЎ JSON schemaгҖҒserviceMethod еҪ’дёҖеҢ– |
+| `RuleUnitBusinessCaseTest` | RFC-0013 е·Іжңүжү§иЎҢиғҪеҠӣз»§з»ӯйҖҡиҝҮ |
+| `RuleTransModuleTest` | ж”№дёәйӘҢиҜҒ pipeline resultпјҢдёҚеҶҚжіЁе…Ҙ `TestExecutionProcessor` |
+
+дёҚеҶҚдҝқз•ҷжҲ–йңҖиҝҒз§»пјҡ
+
+| жөӢиҜ• | еӨ„зҗҶ |
+| --- | --- |
+| `TestExecutionProcessorTest` | еҲ йҷӨпјҢжҲ–з§»еҠЁдёә test-scope еҺҶеҸІе·Ҙе…·жөӢиҜ• |
+| дҫқиө– `assembleExecutableTest(...)` зҡ„ scenario harness | ж”№дёәзј–иҜ‘и§„еҲҷзұ» + дёҡеҠЎ JSON + RuleUnit жү§иЎҢ |

+## 14. йЈҺйҷ©дёҺиҫ№з•Ң
+
+### 14.1 зј–иҜ‘йҖҡиҝҮдёҚд»ЈиЎЁ Module еҸҜз”Ё
+
+з”ҹжҲҗ Java зј–иҜ‘йҖҡиҝҮеҗҺпјҢ`ModuleGenneratorByAnno.buildModule(...)` д»ҚеҸҜиғҪеӣ дёәжіЁи§ЈгҖҒеӯ—ж®өгҖҒи§„еҲҷе…ғж•°жҚ®дёҚе®Ңж•ҙиҖҢеӨұиҙҘгҖӮиҜҘеӨұиҙҘеә”еҪ’зұ»дёә `RULE_UNIT_INFRA_FAILED` жҲ–жӣҙз»Ҷзҡ„ `MODULE_BUILD_FAILED`пјҢP0 дёҚиҮӘеҠЁи®© LLM дҝ®еӨҚпјҢйҷӨйқһй”ҷиҜҜжҳҺзЎ®жқҘиҮӘж–№жі•дҪ“гҖӮ
+
+### 14.2 дёҡеҠЎз”ЁдҫӢеҸҜиғҪжҜ”и§„еҲҷд»Јз Ғжӣҙе®№жҳ“еҮәй”ҷ
+
+LLM з”ҹжҲҗдёҡеҠЎ JSON ж—¶еҸҜиғҪеј•з”ЁдёҚеӯҳеңЁзҡ„ part жҲ– parameterгҖӮP0 йҖҡиҝҮ schema ж ЎйӘҢе’ҢжЁЎеһӢеҜ№иұЎеӯҳеңЁжҖ§ж ЎйӘҢе…ңдҪҸпјҢеӨұиҙҘж—¶дјҳе…ҲйҮҚз”ҹжҲҗдёҡеҠЎ JSONгҖӮ
+
+### 14.3 ModuleConstraintExecutor жҳҜеҚ•дҫӢ
+
+еҪ“еүҚ `ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST` жҳҜеҚ•дҫӢгҖӮ`RuleUnitCaseExecutionProcessor` еҝ…йЎ»еңЁ `finally` дёӯи°ғз”Ё `fini()` е№¶жҒўеӨҚ classloaderгҖӮе№¶еҸ‘жү§иЎҢдёҚеңЁ P0 иҢғеӣҙеҶ…пјӣP1 еҶҚиҖғиҷ‘йҡ”зҰ»жү§иЎҢеҷЁе®һдҫӢжҲ–еҠ й”ҒгҖӮ
+
+### 14.4 еҺҶеҸІжөӢиҜ•иҝҒз§»жҲҗжң¬
+
+`RuleSnippetAssembler` зҡ„ж—§ JUnit з”ҹжҲҗи·Ҝеҫ„еңЁдёҖдәӣ scenario жөӢиҜ•дёӯд»Қиў«дҪҝз”ЁгҖӮP0 еҸҜд»Ҙе…ҲжҠҠиҝҷдәӣжөӢиҜ•ж”№жҲҗ RuleUnit и·Ҝеҫ„пјӣиӢҘиҝҒз§»жҲҗжң¬иҝҮй«ҳпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙдёҙж—¶жҠҠж—§е·Ҙе…·з§»еҠЁеҲ° `src/test/java`пјҢдҪҶдёҚиғҪз•ҷеңЁ `src/main/java`гҖӮ
+

+## 15. еӨҚз”Ёдјҳе…Ҳжё…еҚ•
+
+дјҳе…ҲеӨҚз”Ёпјҡ
+
+- `CategoryIdentifier`
+- `RuleScenarioClassifier`
+- `RuleSnippetGenerator`
+- `RuleSnippetAssembler.assembleCompileUnit(...)`
+- `CompilationProcessor`
+- `RuleTestCaseGenerator.generateBusinessCases(...)`
+- `BusinessRuleTestCaseSet`
+- `DefaultRuleUnitTestExecutorService`
+- `DefaultModuleConstraintExecutor4SingleRule`
+- `RuleUnitInputConverter`
+- `RuleUnitResultComparator`
+- `ModuleGenneratorByAnno`
+
+дёҚж–°еўһпјҡ
+
+- дёҚж–°еўһз¬¬дәҢеҘ—жұӮи§ЈеҷЁгҖӮ
+- дёҚж–°еўһз¬¬дәҢеҘ— JUnit з”ҹжҲҗеҷЁгҖӮ
+- дёҚж–°еўһдёҡеҠЎ JSON д№ӢеӨ–зҡ„жөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢдәӢе®һжЁЎеһӢгҖӮ
+- дёҚеңЁдё»жөҒзЁӢйҮҢжүӢеҶҷ `InferParasReq` / `ModuleValidateReq`гҖӮ
+- дёҚи®© RuleTrans дё»жөҒзЁӢдҫқиө– `ModuleScenarioTestBase`гҖӮ
+
+еҸҜз”ұдёҠдёӢж–ҮжҺЁеҜјпјҡ
+
+- `ruleCode` еҸҜд»Һ `RuleMetadata`гҖҒж–№жі•еҗҚжҲ–жіЁи§Јз”ҹжҲҗгҖӮ
+- `moduleId` еҸҜд»Һз”ҹжҲҗеҗҺзҡ„ Module иҜ»еҸ–гҖӮ
+- part жүҖеұһ category еҸҜд»Һ Module жҹҘиҜўгҖӮ
+- `serviceMethod` еҸҜз”ұ `RuleScenario` + `BusinessRuleFamily` жҺЁеҜјпјӣJSON дёӯзјәзңҒж—¶з”ұз”ҹжҲҗеҷЁеҪ’дёҖеҢ–иЎҘйҪҗгҖӮ

+
+Q1. `TestExecutionProcessor` жҳҜзӣҙжҺҘеҲ йҷӨпјҢиҝҳжҳҜз§»еҠЁеҲ° `src/test/java` дҪңдёәеҺҶеҸІжөӢиҜ•иҝҒз§»жңҹе·Ҙе…·пјҹ

# RFC-0014: RuleTrans йҚ’?RuleUnit йҗЁеӢӯоҒ¬йҚ’жү®оҒ¬ж¶“з»ҳзҘҰз»Ӣе¬®еҷёйҸӢ?
> йҗҳиҲөвӮ¬дҫҠзҙ°й‘ҪеӨӢо”Қй”ӣең–raftй”ӣ?> йҸғгғҰж№Ўй”ӣ?026-06-13
> йҗ©зЁҝеҸ§йҸӮеӣЁгҖӮй”ӣжӯҡdoc/RFC-0011-RuleTrans-Module.md`, `doc/RFC-0013-Business-Readable-Rule-Test-Cases.md`, `doc/CORE-DESIGN.md`, `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md`

---

## 1. йҺҪжЁҝоӣҰ

RFC-0013 е®ёиҢ¬зІЎйҺ¶еЁҫвӮ¬ж»Җз¬ҹйҚ”вҖіеҪІз’Ү?JSON йҗўг„Өз·Ҙ + RuleUnit йҺөСҶо”‘йҸҲе¶…е§ҹйҲҘжҝҲж®‘йҸҚзЁҝзёҫй‘іи—үе§ҸйҺјо…ЎжҚЈйҸүгғЈвӮ¬еӮҡз¶ӢйҚ“е¶…еўҝжөЈж¬“жЈ¶жЈ°жЁ»ж§ёж¶“з»ҳзҘҰз»Ӣе¬ӯз№•еЁҢв„ғж№ҒиӨ°иҜІз°ійҸҖиҲөжҪ«й”ӣжӯҡRuleTransEngine` й“Ҹз•ҢеҠ§е®ёиҢ¬зІЎй‘іеҖҹзҡҹйҗў?`RuleUnitTestExecutorService`й”ӣеұјзөҫйҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҠІж«’йҠҶдҪёз“§еЁҲзӮ№вӮ¬дҪ№жЈ«еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҗўзҶёеһҡйҚЈг„ҘжӢ° `RuleSnippetAssembler` ж¶“о…қзІӣж·ҮжҝҲжҡҖжөңе—ҷжҙҝйҺәгғ§ж•“йҺҙж„¬иӢҹжқ©ж„Ҝо”‘ JUnit йҗЁеӢ®зҹҫеҜ°еӢ©вӮ¬?
йҸҲ?RFC з’ҒжҚҗо…ёж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒ…жҹҠйҗЁеӢӯоҒ¬йҚ’жү®оҒ¬ж¶“з»ҳзҘҰз»Ӣе¬¶зҙ°

```text
йҗўг„Ұеҹӣй‘·оҒҶеҠ§з’Үо…Ўв–Ҳз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
  -> RuleTrans йҚҳзҶёж№ҒзјҲжҳҸзҳ§й–ҫжҚҗзҹҫйҗўзҶёеһҡ Java з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҸӮи§„зЎ¶жөЈ?  -> зјҒеӢ®о—Ҡж¶“еӯҳжӨӮ Java з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜз»«иҜІиӢҹзјӮж ¬зҳ§
  -> йҗўиҫЁж•һз‘ҷпҪҮж•“йҺҙ?Module
  -> йҗўзҶёеһҡж¶“ж°¬е§ҹ JSON йҚ—жӣһеҺ“еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҗўг„Өз·Ҙ
  -> RuleUnitTestExecutorService йҺөСҶо”‘ж¶“ж°¬е§ҹйҗўг„Өз·Ҙ
  -> жқ©ж–ҝжҙ–зјҲжҳҸзҳ§йҠҶдҪәзҙӘз’ҮжҲҷвӮ¬дҪёеҙҹйҚҸеҶ©зҘҙз’Үжӣ зІәж¶“вӮ¬йҺ¶гғҘжҶЎ
```

й–Іе¶ҶзҖҜйҚҡеәҜзҙқRuleTrans ж¶“з»ҳзҘҰз»Ӣе¬©з¬үйҚҗе¶Үж•“йҺҙ?JUnit еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜз»«дјҷзҙқж¶”зҶ¶з¬үйҚҗе¶үвӮ¬ж°із№ғ JUnit Launcher йҺөСҶо”‘йҸҚпҝ зҚҷйҠҶдҫёUnit йҚҷоҒғз¶”ж¶“жҙӘгҖҚйҗ©оҶҝеҡңйҹ¬оӮўжҙ–иӨ°жҺ“зҘҙз’Үжӣҹо”ӢйҸӢи·әз“ЁйҚҰоҹ’зҙқж¶“е¶„з¶”ж¶“?RuleTrans жқ©ж„Ҝо”‘йҸғжңөеҜҢй–ҫжҚҗзҹҫйҗЁеӢӘз«ҙй–®г„ҘеһҺйҠҶ?
---

## 2. иӨ°ж’іеў й—ӮоҮҖо•Ҫ

### 2.1 ж¶“з»ҳзҘҰз»Ӣе¬Әз“ЁйҚҰг„Ұиҙ©йҚҡе ўе§ёйҺ¬?
иӨ°ж’іеў жө пҪҮзҲңж¶“о…һеҮЎзјҒеҝ“еҡӯйҗңзүҲжҹҠйҸғСӮиўұйҸүпҝ ж‘јз’әоҲҡиӢҹзҖӣж©Ҳзҙ°

- йҸӮдјҙж‘јз’әоҲӨзҙ°`RuleTransEngine.translateWithRetry(...)` зјӮж ¬зҳ§йҗўзҶёеһҡйҗЁеӢ®оқүйҚ’ж¬‘иў«йҚҡеәҜзҙқй–«ж°із№ғ `DefaultRuleUnitTestExecutorService` йҺөСҶо”‘ж¶“ж°¬е§ҹ JSON йҗўг„Өз·ҘйҠҶ?- йҸғСҮж‘јз’әоҲӨзҙ°`RuleTransEngine` жө е¶Ҷж•һйҚҸ?`TestExecutionProcessor`й”ӣжІ—RuleSnippetAssembler` жө е¶ҶеҪҒжёҡ?`assembleExecutableTest(...)`й”ӣжІ—TestExecutionProcessor` жө е¶ҮжҙҝйҺәгғӨз··з’§?JUnit LauncherйҠҶ?
жқ©ж¬Һзҙ°з”ҜпёҪжҪөж¶“еӨүйҮңй—ӮоҮҖо•Ҫй”ӣ?
1. ж¶“з»ҳзҘҰз»Ӣе¬©з··з’§ж §еҸ§з»Ҝи®із¬үеЁ“е‘®ж«ҡй”ӣж°ұж№…йҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҠІж«’еҜ°е ҘжҜҰйҚ’гӮҶжҹҮйҗӘзҶёо„ңйҗЁеӢ¬еўҪзҗӣеұҪеҸҶйҚҷпҪҶж§ё RuleUnit жқ©жЁ»ж§ё JUnitйҠҶ?2. йҸғС„ДҒйҚЁе¬«еҜ”зјҒо…ҹзЎ е©•еҝҘзҙ°`RuleTransTestCase`йҠҶд№ЈselectedParts`йҠҶд№Јrequests`йҠҶд№ЈexpectedFirstPartQuantities` з»ӣеӨҠз–„йҗңжқҝзҖ·зҖӣжҘҒоҶҢжө е¶ҲоқҰ source зҒһеӮҷз№ҡйҗЈж¬ҚвӮ¬?3. йҚҡеәЈз”»ж·ҮоҶјоҳІзҖ№и§„ж§—з’§дјҙж•Ҡз’әоҲҡз·һй”ӣж°¬зҙ‘йҚҷжҲЈвӮ¬е‘ӯеҪІй‘із•ҢжҲ·зјҒо…ЎЛү `RuleSnippetAssembler` йҗЁ?JUnit йҗўзҶёеһҡй–«жҳҸз·«й”ӣеІғвӮ¬еұјз¬үйҸ„оҲқЛүе§қпҪ…зҙЎйҗЁ?RuleUnit йҺөСҶо”‘й‘іи—үе§ҸйҠҶ?
### 2.2 йҗ©еӯҳеёҙз’ӢеҶӘж•Ө JUnit ж¶“е¶үвӮ¬еӮҡжӮҺйҚӢж°«з¬ҹйҚ”вҖІеҜҢй–ҫжҚҗзҹҫ

JUnit й–«еӮҡжӮҺйҚӢж°¶гҖҚйҗ©оҶјжҙ–иӨ°жҺ“зҘҙз’ҮжӣӘзҙқж¶“е¶үвӮ¬еӮҡжӮҺйҺөжҢҺеӘҙ RuleTrans жқ©ж„Ҝо”‘йҸҲзҶјзҚҷз’ҮдҫҠзҙ°

- JUnit еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜз»«з»ҳж§ёжө пҪҮзҲңжқһжҲ’з¶Ӣй”ӣеұјз¬үйҸ„оҲҷз¬ҹйҚ”пј„ж•Өжёҡе¬©з°ЁзҖ№зӮҙжҪөе©§ж„©вӮ¬?- JUnit йҺөСҶо”‘йҺ¶гғҘжҶЎй—ҲгҲ жӮңеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜеҰ—е—ҳзҒҰй”ӣеұјз¬үй—ҲгҲ жӮңж¶“ж°¬е§ҹйҗЈеІ„жҪ°йҺҙж Ёж№ҮйҚ”в„ғеёҙйҚҷпҪғвӮ¬?- JUnit йҸӮо…Ўв–Ҳжҫ¶иҫ«и§ҰйҚҷоҒҮе…ҳз’Үеӯҳж§‘йҸҢж„ӘйҮңйҗўзҶёеһҡеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜжҫ¶иҫ«и§Ұй”ӣеұјз¬үжҫ¶в•ғеҠ§зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҗўг„Өз·Ҙй–ІеІҖж®‘ `given`йҠҶд№Јexpect`йҠҶд№Јdiagnostics`йҠҶ?- йҗўзҶёеһҡ JUnit й—ҮвӮ¬з‘•дҪ№еҰёеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜ helperйҠҶдҪ№жҹҮз‘·вӮ¬йҚңеұҪзҙ©йҺҝеәӨзҡҹйҗўг„§зІҸй‘әеӮҡо”ЈйҚҘ?Java е©§ж„®зҲңй”ӣеІғз№ҡй‘і?RFC-0013 йҗЁеӢӘз¬ҹйҚ”вҖіеҪІз’Ү?JSON йҸӮз‘°жӮңйҠҶ?
---
